{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014f9XjmJXqB8K1uwd8qrHqC","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     8→  if (!session) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  // Rate limit: 10 listings per 15 minutes per user\n    13→  const rateLimitKey = `create-listing:${session.userId}`;\n    14→  const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 10);\n    15→  if (!allowed) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Too many listings created. Please try again later.\" },\n    18→      { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  try {\n    23→    const body = await req.json();\n    24→    const {\n    25→      bookTitle,\n    26→      bookAuthor,\n    27→      bookCoverUrl,\n    28→      bookOlid,\n    29→      language,\n    30→      readingPace,\n    31→      startDate,\n    32→      meetingFormat,\n    33→      maxGroupSize,\n    34→      requiresApproval,\n    35→      platformPreference,\n    36→    } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (!bookTitle || !bookAuthor || !readingPace || !startDate || !meetingFormat || !maxGroupSize) {\n    39→      return NextResponse.json(\n    40→        { error: \"Missing required fields\" },\n    41→        { status: 400 }\n    42→      );\n    43→    }\n    44→\n    45→    // Type check all string fields to prevent coercion bypasses\n    46→    if (typeof bookTitle !== \"string\" || typeof bookAuthor !== \"string\" ||\n    47→        typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || typeof startDate !== \"string\" ||\n    48→        typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\") {\n    49→      return NextResponse.json(\n    50→        { error: \"Invalid field types\" },\n    51→        { status: 400 }\n    52→      );\n    53→    }\n    54→\n    55→    if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n    56→      return NextResponse.json(\n    57→        { error: \"Invalid group size\" },\n    58→        { status: 400 }\n    59→      );\n    60→    }\n    61→\n    62→    // Input length limits to prevent abuse\n    63→    if (bookTitle.length > 300 || bookAuthor.length > 200 || readingPace.length > 200) {\n    64→      return NextResponse.json(\n    65→        { error: \"One or more fields exceed maximum length\" },\n    66→        { status: 400 }\n    67→      );\n    68→    }\n    69→\n    70→    if (![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    71→      return NextResponse.json(\n    72→        { error: \"Invalid meeting format\" },\n    73→        { status: 400 }\n    74→      );\n    75→    }\n    76→\n    77→    if (!startDate || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n    78→      return NextResponse.json(\n    79→        { error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" },\n    80→        { status: 400 }\n    81→      );\n    82→    }\n    83→\n    84→    const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    85→    if (startDate < today) {\n    86→      return NextResponse.json(\n    87→        { error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" },\n    88→        { status: 400 }\n    89→      );\n    90→    }\n    91→\n    92→    const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n    93→    if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n    94→      return NextResponse.json(\n    95→        { error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" },\n    96→        { status: 400 }\n    97→      );\n    98→    }\n    99→\n   100→    const platform = [\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)\n   101→      ? platformPreference\n   102→      : \"telegram\";\n   103→\n   104→    // Validate book cover URL — only allow Open Library covers to prevent SSRF/tracking\n   105→    const sanitizedCoverUrl =\n   106→      bookCoverUrl && typeof bookCoverUrl === \"string\" &&\n   107→      bookCoverUrl.startsWith(\"https://covers.openlibrary.org/\")\n   108→        ? bookCoverUrl\n   109→        : \"\";\n   110→\n   111→    // Wrap listing creation + auto-join in a transaction for atomicity\n   112→    const createTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   113→      const result = db\n   114→        .prepare(\n   115→          `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, book_cover_url, book_olid, language, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, requires_approval, platform_preference)\n   116→           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n   117→        )\n   118→        .run(\n   119→          session.userId,\n   120→          bookTitle.trim(),\n   121→          bookAuthor.trim(),\n   122→          sanitizedCoverUrl,\n   123→          bookOlid || \"\",\n   124→          language || \"English\",\n   125→          readingPace.trim(),\n   126→          startDate,\n   127→          meetingFormat,\n   128→          size,\n   129→          requiresApproval ? 1 : 0,\n   130→          platform\n   131→        );\n   132→\n   133→      // Auto-join the author as a member\n   134→      db.prepare(\n   135→        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n   136→      ).run(result.lastInsertRowid, session.userId);\n   137→\n   138→      return result.lastInsertRowid;\n   139→    });\n   140→\n   141→    const listingId = createTransaction();\n   142→\n   143→    return NextResponse.json(\n   144→      { id: listingId },\n   145→      { status: 201 }\n   146→    );\n   147→  } catch (error) {\n   148→    console.error(\"Create listing error:\", error);\n   149→    return NextResponse.json(\n   150→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   151→      { status: 500 }\n   152→    );\n   153→  }\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"c81c3346-4f0b-4780-aab9-80a6c18cc628","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:15.455Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_019fTKwuaoKccvRFyxPir8rZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_018ktoMRKn1T3nKvLahYopEp","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9761,"cache_read_input_tokens":17299,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":9761,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"7f9e1075-49a5-4c38-8724-85caccee6855"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018ktoMRKn1T3nKvLahYopEp","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→\n     4→const PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n     7→  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n     8→\n     9→  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n    10→  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n    11→  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n    12→  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n    13→  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n    14→  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n    15→  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n    16→  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n    17→\n    18→  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n    19→  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n    20→\n    21→  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n    22→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    23→  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n    24→\n    25→  if (!includePast) {\n    26→    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    27→    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    28→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    29→    params.push(effectiveDate);\n    30→  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    31→    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    32→    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    33→    params.push(startDateFrom);\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    37→    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? OR l.book_author LIKE ?)\");\n    38→    params.push(`%${q}%`, `%${q}%`);\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    42→    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    43→    params.push(meetingFormat);\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    47→    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ?\");\n    48→    params.push(`%${readingPace}%`);\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n    52→\n    53→  let orderClause = \"l.created_at DESC\";\n    54→  if (sort === \"oldest\") orderClause = \"l.created_at ASC\";\n    55→  else if (sort === \"start_date\") orderClause = \"l.start_date ASC\";\n    56→\n    57→  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n    58→\n    59→  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n    60→  const countResult = db\n    61→    .prepare(\n    62→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    63→    )\n    64→    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n    65→\n    66→  const listings = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT\n    69→        l.*,\n    70→        u.display_name as author_name,\n    71→        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    72→      FROM listings l\n    73→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    74→      WHERE ${whereClause}\n    75→      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n    76→      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    77→    )\n    78→    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n    79→\n    80→  return NextResponse.json({\n    81→    listings,\n    82→    pagination: {\n    83→      page,\n    84→      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n    85→      total: countResult.total,\n    86→      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    87→    },\n    88→  });\n    89→}\n    90→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"a5b56c9e-7d68-462e-91f5-644602afe046","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:16.280Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_019fTKwuaoKccvRFyxPir8rZ","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01DUg2duGkKzD7iv97JXQAvD","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/auth/login/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":9761,"cache_read_input_tokens":17299,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":9761,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"873c2722-a405-4000-ac0c-b5e4e0793a70"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DUg2duGkKzD7iv97JXQAvD","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email and password are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 5 login attempts per email+IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const rateLimitKey = `login:${ip}:${email.toLowerCase().trim()}`;\n    21→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(rateLimitKey, 5);\n    22→    if (!allowed) {\n    23→      return NextResponse.json(\n    24→        { error: \"Too many login attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    25→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    26→      );\n    27→    }\n    28→\n    29→    const user = db\n    30→      .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, password_hash, display_name FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    31→      .get(email.toLowerCase().trim()) as\n    32→      | { id: number; email: string; password_hash: string; display_name: string }\n    33→      | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→    if (!user) {\n    36→      return NextResponse.json(\n    37→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    38→        { status: 401 }\n    39→      );\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);\n    43→    if (!valid) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Invalid email or password\" },\n    46→        { status: 401 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    const session = await getSession();\n    51→    session.userId = user.id;\n    52→    session.email = user.email;\n    53→    session.displayName = user.display_name;\n    54→    await session.save();\n    55→\n    56→    return NextResponse.json({\n    57→      user: {\n    58→        id: user.id,\n    59→        email: user.email,\n    60→        displayName: user.display_name,\n    61→      },\n    62→    });\n    63→  } catch (error) {\n    64→    console.error(\"Login error:\", error);\n    65→    return NextResponse.json(\n    66→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    67→      { status: 500 }\n    68→    );\n    69→  }\n    70→}\n    71→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"57abecf7-fd35-463c-b27c-30433ef7112a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:16.469Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01YcLmMQDdksvvZe69vB9LCr","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     5→import { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n     6→\n     7→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n    10→\n    11→    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n    12→      return NextResponse.json(\n    13→        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n    14→        { status: 400 }\n    15→      );\n    16→    }\n    17→\n    18→    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    19→    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    20→    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    21→    if (!allowed) {\n    22→      return NextResponse.json(\n    23→        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n    24→        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n    25→      );\n    26→    }\n    27→\n    28→    if (password.length < 8) {\n    29→      return NextResponse.json(\n    30→        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n    31→        { status: 400 }\n    32→      );\n    33→    }\n    34→\n    35→    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    36→    if (password.length > 72) {\n    37→      return NextResponse.json(\n    38→        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n    39→        { status: 400 }\n    40→      );\n    41→    }\n    42→\n    43→    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    44→      return NextResponse.json(\n    45→        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n    46→        { status: 400 }\n    47→      );\n    48→    }\n    49→\n    50→    if (email.length > 254) {\n    51→      return NextResponse.json(\n    52→        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n    53→        { status: 400 }\n    54→      );\n    55→    }\n    56→\n    57→    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n    58→      return NextResponse.json(\n    59→        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n    60→        { status: 400 }\n    61→      );\n    62→    }\n    63→\n    64→    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    65→    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n    66→\n    67→    // Check if email is already taken\n    68→    const existing = db\n    69→      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n    70→      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    71→    if (existing) {\n    72→      return NextResponse.json(\n    73→        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n    74→        { status: 409 }\n    75→      );\n    76→    }\n    77→\n    78→    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n    79→\n    80→    const result = db\n    81→      .prepare(\n    82→        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n    83→      )\n    84→      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n    85→\n    86→    // Auto-login after registration\n    87→    const session = await getSession();\n    88→    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    89→    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    90→    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    91→    await session.save();\n    92→\n    93→    return NextResponse.json(\n    94→      {\n    95→        user: {\n    96→          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n    97→          email: normalizedEmail,\n    98→          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n    99→        },\n   100→      },\n   101→      { status: 201 }\n   102→    );\n   103→  } catch (error) {\n   104→    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n   105→    return NextResponse.json(\n   106→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n   107→      { status: 500 }\n   108→    );\n   109→  }\n   110→}\n   111→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"5f643081-64d3-463c-8d15-bc02641b13ba","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:17.161Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BCBXn4KVh3m2Ptg2F8vkSp","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (listingId == null || ratedUserId == null || score == null) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  // Validate listingId and ratedUserId are positive integers\n    37→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    38→    return NextResponse.json(\n    39→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    40→      { status: 400 }\n    41→    );\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  if (typeof ratedUserId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(ratedUserId) || ratedUserId < 1) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Invalid ratedUserId\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    54→      { status: 400 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    59→    return NextResponse.json(\n    60→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    61→      { status: 400 }\n    62→    );\n    63→  }\n    64→\n    65→  if (comment !== undefined && comment !== null && typeof comment !== \"string\") {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Comment must be a string\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (comment && typeof comment === \"string\" && comment.length > 1000) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Verify listing exists and is full\n    80→  const listing = db\n    81→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    82→    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n    83→\n    84→  if (!listing) {\n    85→    return NextResponse.json(\n    86→      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n    87→      { status: 404 }\n    88→    );\n    89→  }\n    90→\n    91→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    92→    return NextResponse.json(\n    93→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    94→      { status: 400 }\n    95→    );\n    96→  }\n    97→\n    98→  // Verify both users are members\n    99→  const raterMember = db\n   100→    .prepare(\n   101→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   102→    )\n   103→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   104→\n   105→  if (!raterMember) {\n   106→    return NextResponse.json(\n   107→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n   108→      { status: 403 }\n   109→    );\n   110→  }\n   111→\n   112→  const ratedMember = db\n   113→    .prepare(\n   114→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n   115→    )\n   116→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n   117→\n   118→  if (!ratedMember) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json(\n   120→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n   121→      { status: 400 }\n   122→    );\n   123→  }\n   124→\n   125→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   126→  const existing = db\n   127→    .prepare(\n   128→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   129→    )\n   130→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (existing) {\n   133→    db.prepare(\n   134→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   135→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   136→  } else {\n   137→    db.prepare(\n   138→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   139→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   140→\n   141→    // Notify the rated user\n   142→    createNotification(\n   143→      ratedUserId,\n   144→      listingId,\n   145→      \"rating_received\",\n   146→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   151→}\n   152→\n   153→/**\n   154→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   155→ *\n   156→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   157→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   158→ */\n   159→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   160→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   161→  if (!session) {\n   162→    return NextResponse.json(\n   163→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   164→      { status: 401 }\n   165→    );\n   166→  }\n   167→\n   168→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   169→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   170→    return NextResponse.json(\n   171→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   172→      { status: 400 }\n   173→    );\n   174→  }\n   175→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   176→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   177→    return NextResponse.json(\n   178→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   179→      { status: 400 }\n   180→    );\n   181→  }\n   182→\n   183→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   184→  const isMember = db\n   185→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   186→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   187→  if (!isMember) {\n   188→    return NextResponse.json(\n   189→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   190→      { status: 403 }\n   191→    );\n   192→  }\n   193→\n   194→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   195→  const givenRatings = db\n   196→    .prepare(\n   197→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   198→       FROM ratings r\n   199→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   200→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   201→    )\n   202→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   203→      rated_user_id: number;\n   204→      score: number;\n   205→      comment: string;\n   206→      display_name: string;\n   207→    }[];\n   208→\n   209→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   210→  const receivedRatings = db\n   211→    .prepare(\n   212→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   213→       FROM ratings r\n   214→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   215→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   216→    )\n   217→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   218→      rater_id: number;\n   219→      score: number;\n   220→      comment: string;\n   221→      display_name: string;\n   222→    }[];\n   223→\n   224→  return NextResponse.json({\n   225→    givenRatings,\n   226→    receivedRatings,\n   227→  });\n   228→}\n   229→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"2e976685-2bff-4284-89aa-84bd4da1a1a2","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:20.364Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01WHNXxf4p2nbMELpqGUMByS","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_011XtCBgDmnoXTXqGCgpWWR5","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/notifications/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5623,"cache_read_input_tokens":27060,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5623,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"baf929bf-7d51-4a38-b705-6e31efbeeb90"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011XtCBgDmnoXTXqGCgpWWR5","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    // Validate notificationId is a positive integer\n    44→    if (typeof notificationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(notificationId) || notificationId < 1) {\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid notification ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    46→    }\n    47→    db.prepare(\n    48→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    50→  } else {\n    51→    // Mark all as read\n    52→    db.prepare(\n    53→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    54→    ).run(session.userId);\n    55→  }\n    56→\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"581e7928-da9c-48a1-b38a-9e218bb04b26","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:20.787Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Hfon82pZXir1cZe38QP8UT","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"22a5a3c8-3dbd-4946-b9d2-24c210ccc51b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:21.257Z"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01WHNXxf4p2nbMELpqGUMByS","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01SaNY7ESZsDgchsV85qzsMw","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5623,"cache_read_input_tokens":27060,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5623,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":34,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"89b49bd6-7b04-43e8-8cb8-80b717fc1362"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SaNY7ESZsDgchsV85qzsMw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"caa6aff0-da81-497e-8fe2-9c2578ed6ae8","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:21.600Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"adc0ac7b873f9ff45","tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","description":"Reading app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":39012,"tool_uses":19,"duration_ms":25317},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"238d2f46-7211-4e8a-9def-11f5c4ac1955","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01HPjGLLY5MZdm2DVX6MezyN","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01PyvVeyMSfxbJvVxZQswgxq","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":5701,"cache_read_input_tokens":32683,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":5701,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"a905461f-d161-4f2b-a357-96ab4e394afc"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PyvVeyMSfxbJvVxZQswgxq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\n     6→  sendMessage,\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\n     8→  escapeHtml,\n     9→} from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n    10→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    11→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    12→\n    13→/**\n    14→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\n    15→ *\n    16→ * Handles two types of updates:\n    17→ *\n    18→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\n    19→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\n    20→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\n    21→ *    and save it to the listing.\n    22→ *\n    23→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\n    24→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\n    25→ */\n    26→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    27→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    28→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    29→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    31→  }\n    32→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\");\n    33→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    35→  }\n    36→\n    37→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\n    38→  try {\n    39→    update = await req.json();\n    40→  } catch {\n    41→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid JSON\" }, { status: 400 });\n    42→  }\n    43→\n    44→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\n    45→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\n    46→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\n    47→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\n    52→  if (update.message) {\n    53→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\n    57→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    58→}\n    59→\n    60→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\n    61→  chat: {\n    62→    id: number;\n    63→    title?: string;\n    64→    type: string;\n    65→  };\n    66→  from: {\n    67→    id: number;\n    68→    first_name: string;\n    69→  };\n    70→  new_chat_member: {\n    71→    user: {\n    72→      id: number;\n    73→      is_bot: boolean;\n    74→    };\n    75→    status: string;\n    76→  };\n    77→}\n    78→\n    79→interface TelegramMessage {\n    80→  chat: {\n    81→    id: number;\n    82→    type: string;\n    83→    title?: string;\n    84→  };\n    85→  text?: string;\n    86→  from?: {\n    87→    id: number;\n    88→  };\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\n    93→ *\n    94→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\n    95→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\n    96→ * 1. Creates the group\n    97→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\n    98→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\n    99→ *\n   100→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\n   101→ */\n   102→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\n   103→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\n   104→\n   105→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\n   106→  if (\n   107→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\n   108→    ![\"member\", \"administrator\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\n   109→  ) {\n   110→    return;\n   111→  }\n   112→\n   113→  // Only process group chats\n   114→  if (![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(chat.type)) {\n   115→    return;\n   116→  }\n   117→\n   118→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\n   119→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\n   120→  const pending = db\n   121→    .prepare(\n   122→      \"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\"\n   123→    )\n   124→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→\n   126→  if (pending) {\n   127→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\n   128→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\").run(\n   129→      chat.id\n   130→    );\n   131→    return;\n   132→  }\n   133→\n   134→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\n   135→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\n   136→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\n   137→  await sendMessage(\n   138→    chat.id,\n   139→    \"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\n\\n\" +\n   140→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\n   141→      \"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\"\n   142→  );\n   143→\n   144→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\n   145→  try {\n   146→    db.prepare(\n   147→      \"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\"\n   148→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \"\");\n   149→  } catch {\n   150→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\n   151→  }\n   152→}\n   153→\n   154→/**\n   155→ * Handle messages in group chats.\n   156→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\n   157→ */\n   158→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\n   159→  if (!message.text || ![\"group\", \"supergroup\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\n   160→    return;\n   161→  }\n   162→\n   163→  const text = message.text.trim();\n   164→\n   165→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\n   166→  if (text.startsWith(\"/start \")) {\n   167→    const payload = text.replace(\"/start \", \"\").trim();\n   168→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\n   169→    if (listingId) {\n   170→      // Verify the sender is the listing author to prevent unauthorized linking\n   171→      const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   172→      if (!telegramUserId) {\n   173→        await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   174→        return;\n   175→      }\n   176→\n   177→      const linkedUser = db\n   178→        .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   179→        .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   180→\n   181→      if (linkedUser) {\n   182→        const listing = db\n   183→          .prepare(\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   184→          .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\n   185→\n   186→        if (listing && listing.author_id === linkedUser.user_id) {\n   187→          await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   188→          return;\n   189→        }\n   190→      }\n   191→\n   192→      // If no linked user or not the author, store for later linking via /link command\n   193→      await sendMessage(\n   194→        message.chat.id,\n   195→        \"To link this group to a Bookmate listing, the listing author should use the <code>/link</code> command.\"\n   196→      );\n   197→      return;\n   198→    }\n   199→  }\n   200→\n   201→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\n   202→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   203→  if (text === \"/link\") {\n   204→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   205→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   206→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   207→      return;\n   208→    }\n   209→\n   210→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\n   211→    const linkedUser = db\n   212→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   213→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   214→\n   215→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   216→      await sendMessage(\n   217→        message.chat.id,\n   218→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \" +\n   219→          \"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\"\n   220→      );\n   221→      return;\n   222→    }\n   223→\n   224→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\n   225→    const unlinkedListings = db\n   226→      .prepare(\n   227→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\n   228→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\n   229→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\n   230→         AND author_id = ?\n   231→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\n   232→      )\n   233→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\n   234→\n   235→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\n   236→      await sendMessage(\n   237→        message.chat.id,\n   238→        \"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\"\n   239→      );\n   240→      return;\n   241→    }\n   242→\n   243→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\n   244→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\n   245→      return;\n   246→    }\n   247→\n   248→    const listText = unlinkedListings\n   249→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \"${escapeHtml(l.book_title)}\"`)\n   250→      .join(\"\\n\");\n   251→    await sendMessage(\n   252→      message.chat.id,\n   253→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\n\\n${listText}`\n   254→    );\n   255→    return;\n   256→  }\n   257→\n   258→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\n   259→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\/link_(\\d+)$/);\n   260→  if (linkMatch) {\n   261→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\n   262→    if (!telegramUserId) {\n   263→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \"Could not identify the sender.\");\n   264→      return;\n   265→    }\n   266→\n   267→    const linkedUser = db\n   268→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\")\n   269→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\n   270→\n   271→    if (!linkedUser) {\n   272→      await sendMessage(\n   273→        message.chat.id,\n   274→        \"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\"\n   275→      );\n   276→      return;\n   277→    }\n   278→\n   279→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\n   280→\n   281→    // Verify this user is the listing author and the listing is full\n   282→    const listing = db\n   283→      .prepare(\"SELECT author_id, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   284→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number; is_full: number } | undefined;\n   285→\n   286→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\n   287→      await sendMessage(\n   288→        message.chat.id,\n   289→        \"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\"\n   290→      );\n   291→      return;\n   292→    }\n   293→\n   294→    if (!listing.is_full) {\n   295→      await sendMessage(\n   296→        message.chat.id,\n   297→        \"This listing's group is not full yet. You can link a Telegram group once the group reaches its maximum size.\"\n   298→      );\n   299→      return;\n   300→    }\n   301→\n   302→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\n   303→  }\n   304→}\n   305→\n   306→/**\n   307→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\n   308→ * 1. Generate an invite link\n   309→ * 2. Save it to the listing\n   310→ * 3. Notify all members\n   311→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\n   312→ */\n   313→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\n   314→  const listing = db\n   315→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   316→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   317→\n   318→  if (!listing) {\n   319→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\");\n   320→    return;\n   321→  }\n   322→\n   323→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n   324→    await sendMessage(chatId, \"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\");\n   325→    return;\n   326→  }\n   327→\n   328→  // Try to create an invite link\n   329→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   330→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   331→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\n   332→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\n   333→  }\n   334→\n   335→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   336→    await sendMessage(\n   337→      chatId,\n   338→      \"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \" +\n   339→        \"then try again with /link\"\n   340→    );\n   341→    return;\n   342→  }\n   343→\n   344→  // Save to database\n   345→  db.prepare(\n   346→    \"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   347→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\n   348→\n   349→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\n   350→  const members = db\n   351→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   352→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   353→\n   354→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\n   355→  for (const member of members) {\n   356→    createNotification(\n   357→      member.user_id,\n   358→      listingId,\n   359→      \"telegram_ready\",\n   360→      `The Telegram group for \"${bookTitle}\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\n   361→    );\n   362→  }\n   363→\n   364→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\n   365→  // Escape book title to prevent HTML injection via Telegram's HTML parser\n   366→  await sendMessage(\n   367→    chatId,\n   368→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \"<b>${escapeHtml(bookTitle)}</b>\".\\n\\n` +\n   369→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\n\\n` +\n   370→      \"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\"\n   371→  );\n   372→}\n   373→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"ea7c48d2-7cf5-4511-b175-0536c04e5739","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:25.398Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017MkWqJNC9ZsVoCyWz32BE9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     9→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    14→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    15→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    18→      { status: 500 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  const body = await req.json();\n    23→  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json(\n    29→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    30→      { status: 500 }\n    31→    );\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    35→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    38→      { status: 500 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    43→  if (!bot) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    46→      { status: 500 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    51→  if (!success) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    54→      { status: 500 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  return NextResponse.json({\n    59→    ok: true,\n    60→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    61→    webhookUrl,\n    62→  });\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    67→ *\n    68→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    69→ */\n    70→export async function GET() {\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    73→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    74→  });\n    75→}\n    76→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"51f36b82-b355-4c2f-b7e6-d88d1236abc1","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:25.736Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01P62TUrZi5WtwCApXdczjdR","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    45→    return NextResponse.json(\n    46→      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n    47→      { status: 400 }\n    48→    );\n    49→  }\n    50→\n    51→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    52→    telegramLink.trim(),\n    53→    listingId\n    54→  );\n    55→\n    56→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    57→}\n    58→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"2a8249d4-704f-4550-95ab-ce84fd8e4169","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:25.950Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01NgRV5Ljb2HfhUzTY3tMZH6","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateGroupDeepLink } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * GET /api/listings/[id]/auto-telegram\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Returns the Telegram deep link for one-click group creation.\n    10→ * Only available to the listing author when the group is full\n    11→ * and no Telegram link has been set yet.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function GET(\n    14→  _req: NextRequest,\n    15→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    16→) {\n    17→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    18→  if (!session) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    21→      { status: 401 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json(\n    27→      { error: \"Telegram bot not configured\", botConfigured: false },\n    28→      { status: 404 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const { id } = await params;\n    33→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    34→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    36→  }\n    37→\n    38→  const listing = db\n    39→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    40→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    41→\n    42→  if (!listing) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"Only the organizer can create the Telegram group\" },\n    49→      { status: 403 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"Group must be full before creating a Telegram group\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\n    61→    return NextResponse.json(\n    62→      { error: \"Telegram link already set\", telegramLink: listing.telegram_link },\n    63→      { status: 400 }\n    64→    );\n    65→  }\n    66→\n    67→  const deepLink = await generateGroupDeepLink(listingId);\n    68→  if (!deepLink) {\n    69→    return NextResponse.json(\n    70→      { error: \"Failed to generate deep link. Check bot configuration.\" },\n    71→      { status: 500 }\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return NextResponse.json({\n    76→    deepLink,\n    77→    instructions:\n    78→      \"Click the link to open Telegram and create a group. The bot will automatically generate an invite link for your reading group.\",\n    79→  });\n    80→}\n    81→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"3b4788e6-c8c6-4abb-8ce6-68daeb123289","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:26.364Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XpwuJbveEc5vYaQY3psY62","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState, useRef } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter, usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    18→  const router = useRouter();\n    19→  const pathname = usePathname();\n    20→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    21→\n    22→  useEffect(() => {\n    23→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    24→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    25→      .then((data) => {\n    26→        if (data.user) {\n    27→          setUser(data.user);\n    28→          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n    29→        }\n    30→      })\n    31→      .catch(() => {\n    32→        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n    33→      });\n    34→  }, [pathname]);\n    35→\n    36→  // Close menus on outside click\n    37→  useEffect(() => {\n    38→    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    39→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n    40→        setMenuOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    44→    return () => {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011B16LFd3ERzaZsXiyK5A5o","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Member {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: number;\n    17→  display_name: string;\n    18→  bio: string;\n    19→  applied_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→interface Listing {\n    23→  id: number;\n    24→  author_id: number;\n    25→  book_title: string;\n    26→  book_author: string;\n    27→  book_cover_url: string;\n    28→  language: string;\n    29→  reading_pace: string;\n    30→  start_date: string;\n    31→  meeting_format: string;\n    32→  max_group_size: number;\n    33→  telegram_link: string;\n    34→  is_full: number;\n    35→  requires_approval: number;\n    36→  created_at: string;\n    37→  author_name: string;\n    38→  members: Member[];\n    39→  memberCount: number;\n    40→  isMember: boolean;\n    41→  isAuthor: boolean;\n    42→  hasApplied: boolean;\n    43→  applicationStatus: string;\n    44→  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n    45→  currentUserId: number | null;\n    46→  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n    47→  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n    48→  platform_preference: string;\n    49→  discord_link: string;\n    50→}\n    51→\n    52→export default function ListingDetail() {\n    53→  const { id } = useParams();\n    54→  const router = useRouter();\n    55→  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n    56→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    57→  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n    58→  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n    59→  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    60→  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    61→  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n    64→  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    65→  // Discord state\n    66→  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    67→  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n    68→  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n    69→  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n    70→  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n    71→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    72→\n    73→  // Rating state\n    74→  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n    75→  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n    76→  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n    77→  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n    78→  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    79→\n    80→  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n    81→\n    82→  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n    83→  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);\n   101→    } finally {\n   102→      setLoading(false);\n   103→    }\n   104→  }, [id]);\n   105→\n   106→  useEffect(() => {\n   107→    fetchListing();\n   108→  }, [fetchListing]);\n   109→\n   110→  const handleDelete = async () => {\n   111→    setDeleting(true);\n   112→    setError(\"\");\n   113→    try {\n   114→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n   115→      const data = await res.json();\n   116→      if (res.ok) {\n   117→        router.push(\"/\");\n   118→      } else {\n   119→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");\n   120→        setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   121→      }\n   122→    } catch {\n   123→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n   124→      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   125→    } finally {\n   126→      setDeleting(false);\n   127→    }\n   128→  };\n   129→\n   130→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   131→    if (!id) return;\n   132→    try {\n   133→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   134→      const data = await res.json();\n   135→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   136→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   137→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   138→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   139→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   140→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   141→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   142→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   143→        }\n   144→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   145→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   146→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   147→      }\n   148→    } catch {\n   149→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   150→    }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"4390eb27-4694-4cb6-b12f-231c23efc5a0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:36.069Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TYmjVvk5zD5DxDtELYP5q8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"63651749-5e5b-49cd-9ad4-dd98cf71e45f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:36.584Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Gd9dM4P3MAQTpyxbze11F4","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    51→\n    52→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    53→\n    54→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    55→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    56→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    57→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    58→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    59→\n    60→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    61→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    62→  const active = readings.filter(\n    63→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({\n    67→    active,\n    68→    history,\n    69→    upcoming,\n    70→    total: readings.length,\n    71→  });\n    72→}\n    73→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"5a714bec-ae94-4be3-8469-d106a60f34a3","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:37.576Z"}
