{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0121RJHcrV1hJKKUGngof5gZ","type":"tool_result","content":"   150→    }\n   151→  }, [id]);\n   152→\n   153→  useEffect(() => {\n   154→    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n   155→      fetchRatings();\n   156→    }\n   157→  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n   158→\n   159→  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n   160→    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n   161→    if (!score) return;\n   162→    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n   163→    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   164→    try {\n   165→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n   166→        method: \"POST\",\n   167→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   168→        body: JSON.stringify({\n   169→          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n   170→          ratedUserId: memberId,\n   171→          score,\n   172→          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n   173→        }),\n   174→      });\n   175→      const data = await res.json();\n   176→      if (!res.ok) {\n   177→        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n   178→      } else {\n   179→        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n   180→        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n   181→          ...prev,\n   182→          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n   183→        }));\n   184→      }\n   185→    } catch {\n   186→      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n   187→    } finally {\n   188→      setRatingSaving(null);\n   189→    }\n   190→  };\n   191→\n   192→  const handleJoin = async () => {\n   193→    setJoining(true);\n   194→    setError(\"\");\n   195→    try {\n   196→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   197→      const data = await res.json();\n   198→      if (!res.ok) {\n   199→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   200→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   201→          return;\n   202→        }\n   203→        setError(data.error);\n   204→        return;\n   205→      }\n   206→      await fetchListing();\n   207→    } catch {\n   208→      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n   209→    } finally {\n   210→      setJoining(false);\n   211→    }\n   212→  };\n   213→\n   214→  const handleApply = async () => {\n   215→    setApplying(true);\n   216→    setError(\"\");\n   217→    try {\n   218→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n   219→      const data = await res.json();\n   220→      if (!res.ok) {\n   221→        if (res.status === 401) {\n   222→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n   223→          return;\n   224→        }\n   225→        setError(data.error);\n   226→        return;\n   227→      }\n   228→      await fetchListing();\n   229→    } catch {\n   230→      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n   231→    } finally {\n   232→      setApplying(false);\n   233→    }\n   234→  };\n   235→\n   236→  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n   237→    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n   238→    setError(\"\");\n   239→    try {\n   240→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n   241→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   242→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   243→        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n   244→      });\n   245→      const data = await res.json();\n   246→      if (!res.ok) {\n   247→        setError(data.error);\n   248→        return;\n   249→      }\n   250→      await fetchListing();\n   251→    } catch {\n   252→      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n   253→    } finally {\n   254→      setDecidingId(null);\n   255→    }\n   256→  };\n   257→\n   258→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   259→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   260→  };\n   261→\n   262→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   263→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   264→    : \"\";\n   265→\n   266→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   267→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   268→    setTelegramSaving(true);\n   269→    setError(\"\");\n   270→    try {\n   271→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n   272→        method: \"POST\",\n   273→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   274→        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n   275→      });\n   276→      const data = await res.json();\n   277→      if (!res.ok) {\n   278→        setError(data.error);\n   279→        return;\n   280→      }\n   281→      await fetchListing();\n   282→    } catch {\n   283→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   284→    } finally {\n   285→      setTelegramSaving(false);\n   286→    }\n   287→  };\n   288→\n   289→  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n   290→    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n   291→    setError(\"\");\n   292→    try {\n   293→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n   294→      const data = await res.json();\n   295→      if (!res.ok) {\n   296→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n   297→        return;\n   298→      }\n   299→      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n   300→    } catch {\n   301→      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n   302→    } finally {\n   303→      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n   304→    }\n   305→  };\n   306→\n   307→  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n   308→    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   309→  };\n   310→\n   311→  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n   312→    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n   313→    : \"\";\n   314→\n   315→  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n   316→    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n   317→    setDiscordSaving(true);\n   318→    setError(\"\");\n   319→    try {\n   320→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n   321→        method: \"POST\",\n   322→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   323→        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n   324→      });\n   325→      const data = await res.json();\n   326→      if (!res.ok) {\n   327→        setError(data.error);\n   328→        return;\n   329→      }\n   330→      await fetchListing();\n   331→    } catch {\n   332→      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n   333→    } finally {\n   334→      setDiscordSaving(false);\n   335→    }\n   336→  };\n   337→\n   338→  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n   339→    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n   340→    setError(\"\");\n   341→    try {\n   342→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n   343→      const data = await res.json();\n   344→      if (!res.ok) {\n   345→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n   346→        return;\n   347→      }\n   348→      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n   349→    } catch {"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"c659ee9f-3c4e-4ff3-a1e2-bb96627773c9","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:41.466Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01J8gfo5kqNHrkaFhjUFTu1b","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Telegram Bot API integration for automatic group creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate deep links for one-click group creation\n     6→ * 2. Detect when the bot is added to a group (via webhook)\n     7→ * 3. Auto-generate and save invite links\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Create Telegram Group\" → opens deep link in Telegram\n    11→ * - Telegram prompts author to create a group with the bot\n    12→ * - Bot receives `my_chat_member` update via webhook\n    13→ * - Bot creates an invite link and saves it to the listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const TELEGRAM_API = `https://api.telegram.org/bot${BOT_TOKEN}`;\n    18→\n    19→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    20→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0;\n    21→}\n    22→\n    23→/**\n    24→ * Call the Telegram Bot API.\n    25→ */\n    26→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    27→  method: string,\n    28→  params?: Record<string, unknown>\n    29→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; result?: T; description?: string }> {\n    30→  const res = await fetch(`${TELEGRAM_API}/${method}`, {\n    31→    method: \"POST\",\n    32→    headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→    body: JSON.stringify(params || {}),\n    34→  });\n    35→  return res.json();\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→/**\n    39→ * Get bot info (username, id).\n    40→ */\n    41→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    42→  id: number;\n    43→  username: string;\n    44→  first_name: string;\n    45→} | null> {\n    46→  const res = await callApi<{\n    47→    id: number;\n    48→    username: string;\n    49→    first_name: string;\n    50→  }>(\"getMe\");\n    51→  return res.ok ? res.result! : null;\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→/**\n    55→ * Generate a deep link that opens Telegram and prompts the user\n    56→ * to create a new group with the bot already added.\n    57→ *\n    58→ * Format: https://t.me/BOT_USERNAME?startgroup=listing_LISTING_ID\n    59→ *\n    60→ * When the user creates the group, Telegram adds the bot and\n    61→ * sends a `my_chat_member` update to our webhook.\n    62→ */\n    63→export async function generateGroupDeepLink(\n    64→  listingId: number\n    65→): Promise<string | null> {\n    66→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    67→  if (!bot) return null;\n    68→  return `https://t.me/${bot.username}?startgroup=listing_${listingId}`;\n    69→}\n    70→\n    71→/**\n    72→ * Create an invite link for a chat where the bot is an admin.\n    73→ */\n    74→export async function createChatInviteLink(\n    75→  chatId: number | string\n    76→): Promise<string | null> {\n    77→  const res = await callApi<{ invite_link: string }>(\n    78→    \"createChatInviteLink\",\n    79→    {\n    80→      chat_id: chatId,\n    81→      name: \"Bookmate Reading Group\",\n    82→      creates_join_request: false,\n    83→    }\n    84→  );\n    85→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n    86→    return res.result.invite_link;\n    87→  }\n    88→  return null;\n    89→}\n    90→\n    91→/**\n    92→ * Export the existing invite link for a chat (fallback).\n    93→ */\n    94→export async function exportChatInviteLink(\n    95→  chatId: number | string\n    96→): Promise<string | null> {\n    97→  const res = await callApi<string>(\"exportChatInviteLink\", {\n    98→    chat_id: chatId,\n    99→  });\n   100→  if (res.ok && res.result) {\n   101→    return res.result;\n   102→  }\n   103→  return null;\n   104→}\n   105→\n   106→/**\n   107→ * Escape HTML special characters for Telegram HTML parse mode.\n   108→ * Telegram's HTML parser interprets <, >, &, and \" — all must be escaped\n   109→ * in user-supplied content to prevent message injection.\n   110→ */\n   111→export function escapeHtml(text: string): string {\n   112→  return text\n   113→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n   114→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n   115→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n   116→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\");\n   117→}\n   118→\n   119→/**\n   120→ * Send a message to a Telegram chat.\n   121→ */\n   122→export async function sendMessage(\n   123→  chatId: number | string,\n   124→  text: string\n   125→): Promise<boolean> {\n   126→  const res = await callApi(\"sendMessage\", {\n   127→    chat_id: chatId,\n   128→    text,\n   129→    parse_mode: \"HTML\",\n   130→  });\n   131→  return res.ok;\n   132→}\n   133→\n   134→/**\n   135→ * Set up webhook URL for receiving Telegram updates.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function setWebhook(url: string): Promise<boolean> {\n   138→  const res = await callApi(\"setWebhook\", {\n   139→    url,\n   140→    allowed_updates: [\"my_chat_member\", \"message\"],\n   141→  });\n   142→  return res.ok;\n   143→}\n   144→\n   145→/**\n   146→ * Parse the listing ID from a /start command payload.\n   147→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   148→ */\n   149→export function parseListingIdFromPayload(\n   150→  payload: string\n   151→): number | null {\n   152→  const match = payload.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   153→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   154→}\n   155→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"257f5fa0-ec8c-4bf0-8247-0154c03a3602","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:41.906Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LYhGsvAVyVS75tv8ycYGk1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n     5→ * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n     6→ */\n     7→export function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n     8→  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n     9→  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n    10→  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    11→    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\n    12→    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    13→    return false;\n    14→  }\n    15→  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n    16→}\n    17→\n    18→/**\n    19→ * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n    20→ */\n    21→export function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n    22→  return text\n    23→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    24→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    25→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    26→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    27→    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n    28→}\n    29→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"e2e3cb1f-06e7-42ad-937b-e1bc4df01a2b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:44.975Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Up3s6PfuNa3hMjXjtyZ7Ja","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import {\n     4→  createTextChannel,\n     5→  createChannelInvite,\n     6→  sendChannelMessage,\n     7→  isValidSnowflake,\n     8→} from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     9→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n    10→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n    11→\n    12→/**\n    13→ * Discord webhook endpoint for bot events.\n    14→ *\n    15→ * This endpoint handles:\n    16→ * 1. POST with { type: \"link\", guildId, listingId } - Link a Discord server to a listing\n    17→ *    (called by the bot or by an admin setup flow)\n    18→ *\n    19→ * Note: Unlike Telegram's push-based webhook, Discord uses Gateway (WebSocket)\n    20→ * for real-time events. This endpoint is used as an HTTP callback for\n    21→ * simpler integration scenarios or manual triggering.\n    22→ */\n    23→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    24→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\n    25→  const webhookSecret = process.env.DISCORD_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\n    26→  if (!webhookSecret) {\n    27→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook not configured\" }, { status: 500 });\n    28→  }\n    29→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\"X-Discord-Webhook-Secret\");\n    30→  if (!headerSecret || !safeCompare(headerSecret, webhookSecret)) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  try {\n    35→    const body = await req.json();\n    36→    const { type } = body;\n    37→\n    38→    if (type === \"link\") {\n    39→      return handleLink(body);\n    40→    }\n    41→\n    42→    // Discord Interaction verification (for future slash command support)\n    43→    if (type === 1) {\n    44→      // PING - respond with PONG\n    45→      return NextResponse.json({ type: 1 });\n    46→    }\n    47→\n    48→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unknown event type\" }, { status: 400 });\n    49→  } catch (err) {\n    50→    console.error(\"Discord webhook error:\", err);\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n    53→      { status: 500 }\n    54→    );\n    55→  }\n    56→}\n    57→\n    58→async function handleLink(body: {\n    59→  guildId: string;\n    60→  listingId: number;\n    61→  channelId?: string;\n    62→}) {\n    63→  const { guildId, listingId, channelId } = body;\n    64→\n    65→  if (!guildId || !listingId) {\n    66→    return NextResponse.json(\n    67→      { error: \"Missing guildId or listingId\" },\n    68→      { status: 400 }\n    69→    );\n    70→  }\n    71→\n    72→  if (typeof listingId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(listingId) || listingId < 1) {\n    73→    return NextResponse.json(\n    74→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n    75→      { status: 400 }\n    76→    );\n    77→  }\n    78→\n    79→  // Validate Discord snowflake IDs to prevent path traversal in API URLs\n    80→  if (typeof guildId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(guildId)) {\n    81→    return NextResponse.json(\n    82→      { error: \"Invalid guildId format\" },\n    83→      { status: 400 }\n    84→    );\n    85→  }\n    86→  if (channelId !== undefined && (typeof channelId !== \"string\" || !isValidSnowflake(channelId))) {\n    87→    return NextResponse.json(\n    88→      { error: \"Invalid channelId format\" },\n    89→      { status: 400 }\n    90→    );\n    91→  }\n    92→\n    93→  const listing = db\n    94→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    95→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    96→\n    97→  if (!listing) {\n    98→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    99→  }\n   100→\n   101→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n   102→    return NextResponse.json(\n   103→      { error: \"Cannot link Discord until the group is full\" },\n   104→      { status: 400 }\n   105→    );\n   106→  }\n   107→\n   108→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n   109→    return NextResponse.json(\n   110→      { error: \"Discord link already set for this listing\" },\n   111→      { status: 400 }\n   112→    );\n   113→  }\n   114→\n   115→  let targetChannelId = channelId;\n   116→\n   117→  // If no channel specified, create one\n   118→  if (!targetChannelId) {\n   119→    const bookTitle = String(listing.book_title || \"reading-group\");\n   120→    const channelName = `bookmate-${bookTitle\n   121→      .toLowerCase()\n   122→      .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\")\n   123→      .slice(0, 80)}`;\n   124→\n   125→    const channel = await createTextChannel(\n   126→      guildId,\n   127→      channelName,\n   128→      `Bookmate reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" by ${listing.book_author}`\n   129→    );\n   130→\n   131→    if (!channel) {\n   132→      return NextResponse.json(\n   133→        { error: \"Failed to create Discord channel. Make sure the bot has Manage Channels permission.\" },\n   134→        { status: 500 }\n   135→      );\n   136→    }\n   137→\n   138→    targetChannelId = channel.id;\n   139→  }\n   140→\n   141→  // Create invite link\n   142→  const inviteLink = await createChannelInvite(targetChannelId);\n   143→  if (!inviteLink) {\n   144→    return NextResponse.json(\n   145→      { error: \"Failed to create invite link. Make sure the bot has Create Instant Invite permission.\" },\n   146→      { status: 500 }\n   147→    );\n   148→  }\n   149→\n   150→  // Save to DB\n   151→  db.prepare(\n   152→    \"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ?, discord_channel_id = ? WHERE id = ?\"\n   153→  ).run(inviteLink, targetChannelId, listingId);\n   154→\n   155→  // Notify all members\n   156→  const members = db\n   157→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   158→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   159→\n   160→  for (const member of members) {\n   161→    createNotification(\n   162→      member.user_id,\n   163→      listingId,\n   164→      \"discord_ready\",\n   165→      `The Discord channel for \"${listing.book_title}\" is ready! Join to start discussing.`\n   166→    );\n   167→  }\n   168→\n   169→  // Send welcome message to the channel\n   170→  await sendChannelMessage(\n   171→    targetChannelId,\n   172→    `Welcome to the **${listing.book_title}** reading group! 📚\\n\\n` +\n   173→      `This channel was created by Bookmate for your reading group.\\n` +\n   174→      `**Reading pace:** ${listing.reading_pace}\\n` +\n   175→      `**Start date:** ${listing.start_date}\\n\\n` +\n   176→      `Happy reading! 🎉`\n   177→  );\n   178→\n   179→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, inviteLink });\n   180→}\n   181→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"8dd36739-bf07-4ba8-99f5-9b1bc6ad5e14","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:45.795Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01RDWrWKJnAJHt97pLanS2aA","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { isBotConfigured, generateBotInviteUrl } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function GET(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await getSession();\n    11→  if (!session.userId) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json(\n    13→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    14→      { status: 401 }\n    15→    );\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    19→    return NextResponse.json(\n    20→      { error: \"Discord bot is not configured\" },\n    21→      { status: 503 }\n    22→    );\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  const { id } = await params;\n    26→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    27→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  const listing = db\n    32→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    33→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    37→  }\n    38→\n    39→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    40→    return NextResponse.json(\n    41→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set up the Discord group\" },\n    42→      { status: 403 }\n    43→    );\n    44→  }\n    45→\n    46→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json(\n    48→      { error: \"The group is not full yet\" },\n    49→      { status: 400 }\n    50→    );\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  if (listing.discord_link) {\n    54→    return NextResponse.json(\n    55→      { error: \"A Discord link has already been set\" },\n    56→      { status: 400 }\n    57→    );\n    58→  }\n    59→\n    60→  const inviteUrl = generateBotInviteUrl(listingId);\n    61→\n    62→  return NextResponse.json({\n    63→    inviteUrl,\n    64→    instructions:\n    65→      \"Click the link to add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server. \" +\n    66→      \"The bot will create a reading group channel and generate an invite link for your members.\",\n    67→  });\n    68→}\n    69→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"b6085f9b-d408-4f82-b1c2-580b6d17ed66","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:46.005Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017hfsrGAjG9xJMEENFQoxgJ","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Listing {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  language: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  requires_approval: number;\n    18→  platform_preference: string;\n    19→  member_count: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  created_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→export default function HomePage() {\n    25→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    27→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  // Search & filter state\n    30→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    34→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    35→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    36→\n    37→  // Pagination state\n    38→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n    39→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n    40→  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n    41→\n    42→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    43→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    44→\n    45→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    46→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n    47→      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n    48→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    49→      const controller = new AbortController();\n    50→      abortRef.current = controller;\n    51→\n    52→      setLoading(true);\n    53→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    54→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    55→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    56→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    57→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    58→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    59→      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n    60→\n    61→      const qs = params.toString();\n    62→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n    63→        .then((r) => {\n    64→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    65→          return r.json();\n    66→        })\n    67→        .then((data) => {\n    68→          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n    69→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    70→          if (data.pagination) {\n    71→            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n    72→            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n    73→          }\n    74→          setError(null);\n    75→          setLoading(false);\n    76→        })\n    77→        .catch((err) => {\n    78→          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n    79→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    80→          setLoading(false);\n    81→        });\n    82→    },\n    83→    []\n    84→  );\n    85→\n    86→  // Initial fetch\n    87→  useEffect(() => {\n    88→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n    89→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    90→\n    91→  // Cleanup debounce timer and in-flight request on unmount\n    92→  useEffect(() => {\n    93→    return () => {\n    94→      if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    95→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    96→    };\n    97→  }, []);\n    98→\n    99→  // Debounced search\n   100→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n   101→    setSearchQuery(value);\n   102→    setPage(1);\n   103→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n   104→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n   105→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   106→    }, 400);\n   107→  };\n   108→\n   109→  // Immediate filter changes\n   110→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n   111→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n   112→    setPage(1);\n   113→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   114→  };\n   115→\n   116→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n   117→    setReadingPace(value);\n   118→    setPage(1);\n   119→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n   120→  };\n   121→\n   122→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n   123→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n   124→    setPage(1);\n   125→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n   126→  };\n   127→\n   128→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n   129→    setSort(value);\n   130→    setPage(1);\n   131→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   132→  };\n   133→\n   134→  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n   135→    setPage(newPage);\n   136→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n   137→    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n   138→  };\n   139→\n   140→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   141→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   142→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   143→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   144→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   145→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   146→    setPage(1);\n   147→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n   148→  };\n   149→\n   150→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   151→\n   152→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   153→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   154→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   155→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   156→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   157→    };\n   158→    return labels[f] || f;\n   159→  };\n   160→\n   161→  return (\n   162→    <div>\n   163→      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n   164→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   165→          Find your reading companion\n   166→        </h1>\n   167→        <p\n   168→          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   169→          style={{\n   170→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   171→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   172→          }}\n   173→        >\n   174→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   175→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   176→        </p>\n   177→      </div>\n   178→\n   179→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   180→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   181→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   182→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   183→            <input\n   184→              type=\"text\"\n   185→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   186→              value={searchQuery}\n   187→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   188→              className=\"input-field\"\n   189→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   190→            />\n   191→            <svg\n   192→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   193→              style={{\n   194→                position: \"absolute\",\n   195→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   196→                top: \"50%\",\n   197→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   198→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   199→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   200→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   201→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   202→              }}\n   203→              fill=\"none\"\n   204→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   205→              strokeWidth={2}\n   206→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   207→            >\n   208→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   209→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   210→            </svg>\n   211→          </div>\n   212→          <button\n   213→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   214→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   215→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   216→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   217→            style={{\n   218→              display: \"flex\",\n   219→              alignItems: \"center\",\n   220→              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n   221→              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n   222→              position: \"relative\",\n   223→            }}\n   224→          >\n   225→            <svg\n   226→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   227→              width=\"16\"\n   228→              height=\"16\"\n   229→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   230→              fill=\"none\"\n   231→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   232→              strokeWidth={2}\n   233→            >\n   234→              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n   235→              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n   236→              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n   237→            </svg>\n   238→            Filters\n   239→            {hasActiveFilters && (\n   240→              <span\n   241→                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   242→                style={{\n   243→                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n   244→                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n   245→                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n   246→                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   247→                  position: \"absolute\",\n   248→                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n   249→                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n   250→                }}\n   251→              />\n   252→            )}\n   253→          </button>\n   254→        </div>\n   255→\n   256→        {/* Filter panel */}\n   257→        {filtersOpen && (\n   258→          <div\n   259→            id=\"filter-panel\"\n   260→            className=\"card mt-3\"\n   261→            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n   262→          >\n   263→            <div\n   264→              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n   265→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   266→            >\n   267→              <div>\n   268→                <label\n   269→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   270→                  style={{\n   271→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   272→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   273→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   274→                  }}\n   275→                >\n   276→                  Meeting format\n   277→                </label>\n   278→                <select\n   279→                  value={meetingFormat}\n   280→                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n   281→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   282→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   283→                >\n   284→                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n   285→                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n   286→                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n   287→                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n   288→                </select>\n   289→              </div>\n   290→\n   291→              <div>\n   292→                <label\n   293→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   294→                  style={{\n   295→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   296→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   297→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   298→                  }}\n   299→                >\n   300→                  Reading pace\n   301→                </label>\n   302→                <select\n   303→                  value={readingPace}\n   304→                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n   305→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   306→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   307→                >\n   308→                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n   309→                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n   310→                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n   311→                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n   312→                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n   313→                </select>\n   314→              </div>\n   315→\n   316→              <div>\n   317→                <label\n   318→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   319→                  style={{\n   320→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   321→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   322→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   323→                  }}\n   324→                >\n   325→                  Starting from\n   326→                </label>\n   327→                <input\n   328→                  type=\"date\"\n   329→                  value={startDateFrom}\n   330→                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n   331→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   332→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   333→                />\n   334→              </div>\n   335→\n   336→              <div>\n   337→                <label\n   338→                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n   339→                  style={{\n   340→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   341→                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n   342→                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n   343→                  }}\n   344→                >\n   345→                  Sort by\n   346→                </label>\n   347→                <select\n   348→                  value={sort}\n   349→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   350→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   351→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   352→                >\n   353→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   354→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   355→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   356→                </select>\n   357→              </div>\n   358→\n   359→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   360→                <button\n   361→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   362→                  style={{\n   363→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   364→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   365→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   366→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   367→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   368→                    background: \"none\",\n   369→                    border: \"none\",\n   370→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   371→                  }}\n   372→                >\n   373→                  Clear all\n   374→                </button>\n   375→              )}\n   376→            </div>\n   377→          </div>\n   378→        )}\n   379→      </div>\n   380→\n   381→      {/* Results */}\n   382→      {loading ? (\n   383→        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   384→          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n   385→            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n   386→              <div\n   387→                className=\"skeleton\"\n   388→                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n   389→              />\n   390→              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   391→                <div\n   392→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n   393→                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n   394→                />\n   395→                <div\n   396→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n   397→                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n   398→                />\n   399→                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n   400→                  <div\n   401→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   402→                    style={{\n   403→                      width: \"5rem\",\n   404→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   405→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   406→                    }}\n   407→                  />\n   408→                  <div\n   409→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   410→                    style={{\n   411→                      width: \"4rem\",\n   412→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   413→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   414→                    }}\n   415→                  />\n   416→                  <div\n   417→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   418→                    style={{\n   419→                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n   420→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   421→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   422→                    }}\n   423→                  />\n   424→                </div>\n   425→              </div>\n   426→            </div>\n   427→          ))}\n   428→        </div>\n   429→      ) : error ? (\n   430→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   431→          <svg\n   432→            width=\"40\"\n   433→            height=\"40\"\n   434→            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   435→            fill=\"none\"\n   436→            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n   437→            strokeWidth={1.5}\n   438→            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n   439→          >\n   440→            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n   441→            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n   442→            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n   443→          </svg>\n   444→          <p\n   445→            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   446→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   447→          >\n   448→            {error}\n   449→          </p>\n   450→          <button\n   451→            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n   452→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n   453→            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n   454→          >\n   455→            Try again\n   456→          </button>\n   457→        </div>\n   458→      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n   459→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   460→          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n   461→            <>\n   462→              <p\n   463→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   464→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   465→              >\n   466→                No matching reading groups\n   467→              </p>\n   468→              <p\n   469→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   470→                style={{\n   471→         >\n   476→                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n   477→              </p>\n   478→              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n   479→                Clear filters\n   480→              </button>\n   481→            </>\n   482→          ) : (\n   483→            <>\n   484→              <p\n   485→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   486→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   487→              >\n   488→                No reading groups yet\n   489→              </p>\n   490→              <p\n   491→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   492→                style={{\n   493→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   494→ reading group and find your book\n   499→                companions.\n   500→              </p>\n   501→              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n   502→                Create the first listing\n   503→              </Link>\n   504→            </>\n   505→          )}\n   506→        </div>\n   507→      ) : (\n   508→        <>\n   509→          <p\n   510→            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n   511→            style={{\n   512→              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   513→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   514→            }}\n   515→          >\n   516→            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n   517→            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n   518→            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n   519→          </p>\n   520→          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n   521→            {listings.map((listing) => (\n   522→              <Link\n   523→                key={listing.id}\n   524→                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n   525→                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n   526→                role=\"listitem\"\n   527→              >\n   528→                <BookCover\n   529→                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n   530→                  alt={listing.book_title}\n   531→                  width={64}\n   532→                  height={96}\n   533→                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n   534→                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n   535→                />\n   536→\n   537→                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n   538→   >\n   555→                    <span\n   556→                      className=\"badge\"\n   557→                      style={{\n   558→                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n   559→                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   560→                      }}\n   561→                    >\n   562→                      {listing.reading_pace}\n   563→           disabled={page <= 1}\n   642→                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   643→                style={{\n   644→                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   645→                  padding: {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_015YNWjeXJKBHUnTaHNTGwwL","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Notification {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  listing_id: number;\n     9→  type: string;\n    10→  message: string;\n    11→  is_read: number;\n    12→  created_at: string;\n    13→  book_title: string;\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→export default function NotificationsPage() {\n    17→  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n    18→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    19→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    20→\n    21→  useEffect(() => {\n    22→    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    23→      .then((r) => {\n    24→        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load notifications\");\n    25→        return r.json();\n    26→      })\n    27→      .then((data) => {\n    28→        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n    29→        // Mark all as read (fire-and-forget with silent catch)\n    30→        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n    31→          method: \"PATCH\",\n    32→          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n    34→        }).catch(() => {});\n    35→      })\n    36→      .catch(() => {\n    37→        setError(\"Could not load notifications. Please try again.\");\n    38→      })\n    39→      .finally(() => {\n    40→        setLoading(false);\n    41→      });\n    42→  }, []);\n    43→\n    44→  if (loading) {\n    45→    return (\n    46→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n    47→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n    48→      </div>\n    49→    );\n    50→  }\n    51→\n    52→  if (error) {\n    53→    return (\n    54→      <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    55→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    56→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    57→          <p\n    58→            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n    59→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    60→            role=\"alert\"\n    61→          >\n    62→            {error}\n    63→          </p>\n    64→          <button\n    65→            onClick={() => window.location.reload()}\n    66→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n    67→          >\n    68→            Try again\n    69→          </button>\n    70→        </div>\n    71→      </div>\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return (\n    76→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    77→      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    78→\n    79→      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n    80→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    81→          <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n    82→            No notifications yet\n    83→          </p>\n    84→        </div>\n    85→      ) : (\n    86→        <div className=\"space-y-2\">\n    87→          {notifications.map((n) => (\n    88→            <Link\n    89→              key={n.id}\n    90→              href={n.listing_id ? `/listings/${n.listing_id}` : \"#\"}\n    91→              className=\"card block hover:shadow-sm transition-shadow\"\n    92→              style={{\n    93→                borderLeftWidth: \"3px\",\n    94→                borderLeftColor: n.is_read\n    95→                  ? \"var(--color-border)\"\n    96→                  : \"var(--color-accent)\",\n    97→              }}\n    98→              aria-label={`${!n.is_read ? \"Unread: \" : \"\"}${n.message}`}\n    99→            >\n   100→              {!n.is_read && (\n   101→                <span className=\"sr-only\">Unread</span>\n   102→              )}\n   103→              <p\n   104→                className=\"text-sm\"\n   105→                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   106→              >\n   107→                {n.message}\n   108→              </p>\n   109→              <p\n   110→                className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n   111→                style={{\n   112→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   113→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   114→                }}\n   115→              >\n   116→                {new Date(n.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n   117→                  month: \"short\",\n   118→                  day: \"numeric\",\n   119→                  hour: \"numeric\",\n   120→                  minute: \"2-digit\",\n   121→                })}\n   122→              </p>\n   123→            </Link>\n   124→          ))}\n   125→        </div>\n   126→      )}\n   127→    </div>\n   128→  );\n   129→}\n   130→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"1ef3b966-578e-48bf-a4fa-09e3d165a798","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:49.327Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01QkmRvY6XodfTLoc8CoFVvC","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     7→\n     8→interface ReadingItem {\n     9→  id: number;\n    10→  book_title: string;\n    11→  book_author: string;\n    12→  book_cover_url: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  is_full: number;\n    17→  telegram_link: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  max_group_size: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  joined_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→interface Reputation {\n    25→  averageScore: number;\n    26→  totalRatings: number;\n    27→  completedGroups: number;\n    28→  groupsRated: number;\n    29→  breakdown: Record<number, number>;\n    30→  recentRatings: {\n    31→    score: number;\n    32→    comment: string;\n    33→    created_at: string;\n    34→    book_title: string;\n    35→  }[];\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→type TabKey = \"profile\" | \"reading\" | \"genres\" | \"reputation\";\n    39→\n    40→export default function ProfilePage() {\n    41→  const router = useRouter();\n    42→  const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(\"\");\n    43→  const [bio, setBio] = useState(\"\");\n    44→  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n    45→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    46→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n    47→  const [message, setMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    48→\n    49→  // Tab state\n    50→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\"profile\");\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading activity\n    53→  const [active, setActive] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    54→  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    55→  const [upcoming, setUpcoming] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    56→  const [readingLoading, setReadingLoading] = useState(false);\n    57→\n    58→  // Genres\n    59→  const [userGenres, setUserGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    60→  const [availableGenres, setAvailableGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    61→  const [genresLoading, setGenresLoading] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [genresSaving, setGenresSaving] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [genresMessage, setGenresMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    64→\n    65→  // Reputation\n    66→  const [reputation, setReputation] = useState<Reputation | null>(null);\n    67→  const [reputationLoading, setReputationLoading] = useState(false);\n    68→\n    69→  // Track which tabs have been fetched to avoid redundant requests\n    70→  const fetchedTabs = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());\n    71→\n    72→  useEffect(() => {\n    73→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    74→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    75→      .then((data) => {\n    76→        if (!data.user) {\n    77→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    78→          return;\n    79→        }\n    80→        setDisplayName(data.user.displayName);\n    81→        setBio(data.user.bio || \"\");\n    82→        setEmail(data.user.email);\n    83→        setLoading(false);\n    84→      })\n    85→      .catch(() => {\n    86→        // Network error — can't verify auth, redirect to login\n    87→        router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    88→      });\n    89→  }, [router]);\n    90→\n    91→  const fetchReading = useCallback(() => {\n    92→    setReadingLoading(true);\n    93→    fetch(\"/api/profile/reading\")\n    94→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    95→      .then((data) => {\n    96→        setActive(data.active || []);\n    97→        setHistory(data.history || []);\n    98→        setUpcoming(data.upcoming || []);\n    99→        setReadingLoading(false);\n   100→      })"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"fc265423-78ff-48db-89d5-bd9f0721429a","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:49.893Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01X8wqHUie34Hqhu8gJSYmUa","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (\n    45→    !discordLink ||\n    46→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    47→    !(\n    48→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    49→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    50→    )\n    51→  ) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      {\n    54→        error:\n    55→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    56→      },\n    57→      { status: 400 }\n    58→    );\n    59→  }\n    60→\n    61→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    62→    discordLink.trim(),\n    63→    listingId\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"597740ec-4bf1-46e7-8e69-344be1fc647c","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:53.246Z"}
{"type":"system","subtype":"task_progress","task_id":"adc0ac7b873f9ff45","tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","description":"Reading app/lib/discord.ts","usage":{"total_tokens":75761,"tool_uses":37,"duration_ms":54095},"last_tool_name":"Read","uuid":"abc27fac-290b-4328-af90-0fdcff16b1e2","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-6","id":"msg_01B9fKYjkeVwox8kzVxM6dek","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BD99rFEp9DmqA5zcEH2uog","name":"Read","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":12060,"cache_read_input_tokens":62419,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":12060,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":36,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"a6619d11-b58c-42e1-89f8-cfab2ae7526b"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01BD99rFEp9DmqA5zcEH2uog","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n     6→ * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n     7→ * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n    11→ * - Author adds bot to their server\n    12→ * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n    13→ * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const BOT_TOKEN = process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    17→const CLIENT_ID = process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n    18→const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n    19→\n    20→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    21→  return BOT_TOKEN.length > 0 && CLIENT_ID.length > 0;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→/**\n    25→ * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n    26→ * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n    27→ */\n    28→export function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n    29→  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n    30→}\n    31→\n    32→/**\n    33→ * Call the Discord REST API.\n    34→ */\n    35→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    36→  endpoint: string,\n    37→  method: string = \"GET\",\n    38→  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n    39→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n    40→  try {\n    41→    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n    42→      method,\n    43→      headers: {\n    44→        Authorization: `Bot ${BOT_TOKEN}`,\n    45→        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n    46→      },\n    47→      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    48→    });\n    49→\n    50→    if (!res.ok) {\n    51→      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    52→      return {\n    53→        ok: false,\n    54→        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n    55→      };\n    56→    }\n    57→\n    58→    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    59→    return { ok: true, data };\n    60→  } catch (err) {\n    61→    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n    62→  }\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * Get bot user info.\n    67→ */\n    68→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    69→  id: string;\n    70→  username: string;\n    71→} | null> {\n    72→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n    73→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→/**\n    77→ * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n    78→ * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n    79→ *\n    80→ * Permission bits:\n    81→ * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n    82→ * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n    83→ * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n    84→ * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n    85→ * Total: 3089\n    86→ */\n    87→export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n    88→  const permissions = 3089;\n    89→  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n    90→  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${CLIENT_ID}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n    91→}\n    92→\n    93→/**\n    94→ * Create a text channel in a guild.\n    95→ */\n    96→export async function createTextChannel(\n    97→  guildId: string,\n    98→  name: string,\n    99→  topic?: string\n   100→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   101→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   102→    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n   103→    \"POST\",\n   104→    {\n   105→      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n   106→      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n   107→      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n   108→    }\n   109→  );\n   110→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→/**\n   114→ * Create an invite for a channel.\n   115→ */\n   116→export async function createChannelInvite(\n   117→  channelId: string,\n   118→  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n   119→): Promise<string | null> {\n   120→  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n   121→    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n   122→    \"POST\",\n   123→    {\n   124→      max_age: maxAge,\n   125→      max_uses: 0,\n   126→      unique: true,\n   127→    }\n   128→  );\n   129→  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n   130→    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n   131→  }\n   132→  return null;\n   133→}\n   134→\n   135→/**\n   136→ * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n   137→ */\n   138→export async function sendChannelMessage(\n   139→  channelId: string,\n   140→  content: string\n   141→): Promise<boolean> {\n   142→  const res = await callApi(\n   143→    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n   144→    \"POST\",\n   145→    { content }\n   146→  );\n   147→  return res.ok;\n   148→}\n   149→\n   150→/**\n   151→ * Get guild (server) info.\n   152→ */\n   153→export async function getGuild(\n   154→  guildId: string\n   155→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   156→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   157→    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n   158→  );\n   159→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   160→}\n   161→\n   162→/**\n   163→ * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n   164→ */\n   165→export async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n   166→  { id: string; name: string }[]\n   167→> {\n   168→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n   169→    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n   170→  );\n   171→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n   172→}\n   173→\n   174→/**\n   175→ * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n   176→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   177→ */\n   178→export function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n   179→  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   180→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   181→}\n   182→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"3d862e1c-9e17-4503-9e5b-9c20d3415429","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:53.986Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01TCkQZfPoU7PcfGn6ovmzn1","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     7→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    14→\n    15→  if (!setupSecret || !secret || typeof secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(secret, setupSecret)) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    18→      { status: 403 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json(\n    24→      {\n    25→        error:\n    26→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    27→      },\n    28→      { status: 503 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    33→  if (!botInfo) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json(\n    35→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_018gnk1KzTgcYS8avbrkxRZF","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→const isConfigured =\n     4→  !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n     5→  !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n     6→  !!process.env.SMTP_FROM;\n     7→\n     8→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n     9→\n    10→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    11→  if (!isConfigured) return null;\n    12→  if (!transporter) {\n    13→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    14→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    15→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    16→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    17→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    18→        ? {\n    19→            auth: {\n    20→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    21→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    22→            },\n    23→          }\n    24→        : {}),\n    25→    });\n    26→  }\n    27→  return transporter;\n    28→}\n    29→\n    30→export async function sendEmail(\n    31→  to: string,\n    32→  subject: string,\n    33→  text: string,\n    34→  html?: string\n    35→): Promise<boolean> {\n    36→  const t = getTransporter();\n    37→  if (!t) return false;\n    38→\n    39→  try {\n    40→    await t.sendMail({\n    41→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    42→      to,\n    43→      subject,\n    44→      text,\n    45→      html: html || text,\n    46→    });\n    47→    return true;\n    48→  } catch (err) {\n    49→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    50→    return false;\n    51→  }\n    52→}\n    53→\n    54→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    55→  return isConfigured;\n    56→}\n    57→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"306d37ff-5e80-4859-9ace-47e5d9f150e8","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:01:59.541Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01EWCt1bLbipGMA5Fuf34HHF","type":"tool_result","content":"   228→    }\n   229→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   230→      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   231→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(newSize);\n   233→\n   234→      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n   235→      const currentMemberCount = (db\n   236→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   237→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   238→      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n   239→        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n   240→        values.push(0);\n   241→      }\n   242→    }\n   243→    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n   244→      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n   245→      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n   246→    }\n   247→    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n   248→      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n   249→      values.push(platformPreference);\n   250→    }\n   251→\n   252→    if (updates.length === 0) {\n   253→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n   254→    }\n   255→\n   256→    values.push(listingId);\n   257→    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n   258→\n   259→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   260→  } catch (error) {\n   261→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   262→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"5c455f9f-d748-4326-bfe2-beb8159314aa","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:02:03.939Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y1efodvXsUQWyWMTtNpNXA","type":"tool_result","content":"    95→  });\n    96→\n    97→  const result = applyTransaction();\n    98→\n    99→  if (result.error) {\n   100→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   104→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   105→\n   106→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   107→}"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"1bf4c00d-b770-49fa-afe7-b3513bbc34fd","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:02:04.705Z"}
