{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CFACsxpc4RB8qtGXzsss9n","type":"tool_result","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I have a thorough picture of the codebase. Let me compile the findings.\n\n---\n\n## Code Review Report — Bookmate\n\nReviewing all API routes, core libraries, and client components for the five specified focus areas. No unstaged changes are present; this is a full codebase review.\n\n---\n\n## CRITICAL Issues\n\n### 1. Re-application sends a duplicate \"application received\" notification even for rejected re-applicants\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts`, line 104\n\n**Confidence: 92**\n\nThe `applyTransaction` returns `{ error: null, status: 200 }` for two distinct outcomes: a brand-new application (line 94) and a rejected-applicant re-applying (line 86). The `notifyApplicationReceived` call on line 104 fires for both paths unconditionally. When a previously rejected user re-applies, the listing author receives a legitimate \"new application\" notification. This is actually the correct behavior in that scenario, so this is a minor logic concern — **however**, when the transaction returns early with `error != null` (e.g., already pending, already approved), the guard on line 99 blocks the notification correctly.\n\nReassessing: There is actually a subtle issue here. The notification fires even when a rejected user re-applies and the transaction updates an *existing* row. Whether this is intentional is debatable, but it is correct that the author should be notified. This is not a bug. Withdrawing this from Critical.\n\n---\n\n### 2. `PATCH /api/listings/[id]` — `is_full` reopen check uses stale outer `listing` snapshot while member count re-read is not wrapped in a transaction\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts`, lines 235–241\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\nWhen a `PATCH` request increases `maxGroupSize` to reopen a full listing, the code:\n1. Reads `currentMemberCount` from `listing_members` on line 236 (outside a transaction).\n2. Checks `listing.is_full` from the outer `listing` snapshot fetched on line 129 (also outside a transaction).\n3. Builds and runs the `UPDATE` on line 257 — also outside a transaction.\n\nBetween lines 129 and 257, a concurrent `POST /api/listings/[id]/join` could complete (it uses its own transaction) — incrementing `listing_members` and flipping `is_full = 1`. The PATCH then reads the new member count, sees `newSize > currentMemberCount`, and sets `is_full = 0`, **incorrectly reopening a listing that just filled up concurrently.** The join-endpoint's transaction protects its own count check, but the PATCH's non-transactional reopen logic is not coordinated with it. This could allow `is_full` to be incorrectly cleared, letting additional members join beyond `max_group_size`.\n\n**Fix:** Wrap the full PATCH update (including the member-count read and the `is_full` flip logic) in a `db.transaction()`.\n\n---\n\n## IMPORTANT Issues\n\n### 3. `notifyGroupFull` sends notifications based on the author's `platform_preference` flag value at notification time, not at join time — inconsistency after a PATCH\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts`, lines 123–148\n\n**Confidence: 80**\n\n`notifyGroupFull` queries `platform_preference` fresh from the DB. If the author uses `PATCH /api/listings/[id]` to change `platform_preference` between the join completing and the notification being composed (both happen outside the join transaction), the notification message could say \"Telegram group will be set up automatically\" when `platform_preference` was actually \"discord\" at the time the group filled, or vice versa. This is a data consistency issue where the notification message mismatches what actually happens downstream. Because `PATCH` blocks edits once a platform link is set (line 141), the window is narrow but non-zero (before the link is established).\n\nThis is a low-severity inconsistency rather than a security issue, but it can surface as confusing UX.\n\n---\n\n### 4. `safeCompare` in `crypto-utils.ts` leaks string length via timing when lengths differ\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/crypto-utils.ts`, lines 7–16\n\n**Confidence: 85**\n\nThe intent of `safeCompare` is to perform a constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks. When the two buffers have different lengths, the function correctly returns `false` — but it also performs `timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA)` (comparing `a` to itself) to mask the short-circuit. However, the time taken to *reach* the length check (and to call `timingSafeEqual`) is not the same as the time for a same-length comparison where `timingSafeEqual` runs over the full byte array. A remote attacker measuring response latency can still distinguish \"wrong length\" from \"correct length, wrong content\" because `timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA)` completes faster when `bufA` is short than when both buffers are long.\n\nIn practice, the webhook secrets and setup secrets being compared here are fixed-length env-var values, so an attacker cannot enumerate length, but the function's comment claims length-timing is masked which is not entirely accurate. The comment on line 11 states \"Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\" — this claim is not fully correct.\n\nThis is more of a code quality / misleading comment issue than an exploitable vulnerability given the usage context, but it is worth noting for accuracy.\n\n---\n\n### 5. `GET /api/listings/[id]` — `telegram_chat_id` and `discord_channel_id` included in response for all members and the author\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts`, lines 90–94\n\n**Confidence: 88**\n\nThe code correctly strips `telegram_link` and `discord_link` from non-member/non-author responses. However, the `safeListingData` spread includes all other columns from `SELECT l.*` — including `telegram_chat_id` (the internal Telegram group chat ID) and `discord_channel_id` (the internal Discord channel ID). These are internal identifiers not intended for client exposure.\n\nWhile neither ID can be used to join a group directly (invite links are separate), `telegram_chat_id` is a numeric Telegram chat ID and `discord_channel_id` is a Discord snowflake. Exposing Discord channel IDs to all members allows anyone with access to a Discord bot token to message the channel directly, bypassing the platform link system. More directly, exposing `telegram_chat_id` to all members of a group allows them to derive the bot's group association.\n\nThese fields should be explicitly excluded from the API response or only included for the author.\n\n---\n\n### 6. `GET /api/profile/reputation` — unauthenticated users can be served other users' full rating data (endpoint requires auth, but `userId` parameter has no access control intent mismatch)\n\nReviewing this more carefully: the endpoint correctly requires auth (line 11-14), and it strips comments for non-own-profile views (line 92-98). This is correctly implemented. No issue here.\n\n---\n\n### 7. Rate limiter `store` is module-level, but `isBotConfigured()` in `lib/telegram.ts` captures `BOT_TOKEN` at module load time\n\n**File:** `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts`, lines 16–21\n\n**Confidence: 80**\n\n`BOT_TOKEN` is assigned at module initialization from `process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN`. In Next.js App Router with server components, module-level state is shared across requests within the same worker process — this is intentional for the DB singleton. However, `isBotConfigured()` returns the value locked at module load time. If the env var is set after startup (e.g., via PM2 environment injection followed by a `pm2 reload` that causes a hot module swap rather than a full restart), the cached empty string would persist until a full process restart. This is an operational concern, not a security issue, but it could cause `isBotConfigured()` to return `false` even when the token is now set. The same applies to `lib/discord.ts` line 16.\n\nThe real-world risk is low given the PM2 deployment model (full restart via `deploy.sh`), but worth noting.\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n| # | Issue | Severity | Confidence | File |\n|---|-------|----------|------------|------|\n| 2 | `PATCH` listing — non-transactional `is_full` reopen races with concurrent joins | Critical | 85 | `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts:235` |\n| 5 | `telegram_chat_id` and `discord_channel_id` leaked to all group members in listing GET | Important | 88 | `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts:90` |\n| 4 | `safeCompare` comment incorrectly claims length-timing is masked | Important | 85 | `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/crypto-utils.ts:11` |\n| 3 | `notifyGroupFull` reads `platform_preference` outside the join transaction | Important | 80 | `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts:123` |\n| 7 | `BOT_TOKEN` / `CLIENT_ID` captured at module load — `isBotConfigured()` stale after env change without full restart | Low | 80 | `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/telegram.ts:16`, `/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/discord.ts:16` |\n\nThe most actionable fix is issue #2 — wrapping the `PATCH` update logic in a transaction to prevent the race between `is_full` clearing and concurrent joins. Issue #5 is a straightforward field exclusion. The rest are lower priority."},{"type":"text","text":"agentId: adc0ac7b873f9ff45 (use SendMessage with to: 'adc0ac7b873f9ff45' to continue this agent)\n<usage>total_tokens: 85130\ntool_uses: 42\nduration_ms: 118755</usage>"}]}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"4bd1da73-6fc2-424b-8be3-49d8bcb8d4d6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:02:58.639Z","tool_use_result":{"status":"completed","prompt":"Review the Bookmate codebase at /root/Projects/bookmate/app for bugs, security issues, logic errors, and code quality problems. This is a Next.js 15 App Router project with SQLite (better-sqlite3), iron-session auth, and Tailwind CSS.\n\nFocus areas that haven't been reviewed recently:\n1. API route edge cases - especially around concurrent access and error handling\n2. Client-side state management - look for potential memory leaks, stale closures, or race conditions\n3. Database query efficiency - missing indexes, N+1 queries, or inefficient joins\n4. Security - any remaining XSS, CSRF, injection, or auth bypass vectors\n5. Type safety - any `any` types or unsafe casts that could cause runtime errors\n\nThe project has gone through 11 rounds of code review already, so focus on subtle issues that may have been missed. Only report HIGH confidence issues.\n\nKey files:\n- app/app/api/ - all API routes\n- app/app/ - page components\n- app/components/ - shared components\n- app/lib/ - core libraries (db.ts, session.ts, notifications.ts)\n\nDo NOT write any code. Just report findings with file paths, line numbers, and severity.","agentId":"adc0ac7b873f9ff45","content":[{"type":"text","text":"Now I have a thorough picture of the codebase. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01GWQKihAJPnHYzzHPudMXzN","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→import { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     6→import { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     7→\n     8→export async function GET(\n     9→  _req: NextRequest,\n    10→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n    11→) {\n    12→  const { id } = await params;\n    13→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    14→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    15→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    16→  }\n    17→\n    18→  const listing = db\n    19→    .prepare(\n    20→      `SELECT\n    21→        l.*,\n    22→        u.display_name as author_name\n    23→      FROM listings l\n    24→      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n    25→      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    26→    )\n    27→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listing) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    31→  }\n    32→\n    33→  const members = db\n    34→    .prepare(\n    35→      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n    36→       FROM listing_members lm\n    37→       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n    38→       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n    39→       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    40→    )\n    41→    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n    42→\n    43→  const session = await getSession();\n    44→  const isMember = session.userId\n    45→    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    46→    : false;\n    47→  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    48→    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    49→    : false;\n    50→\n    51→  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n    52→  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json(\n    54→      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n    55→      { status: 404 }\n    56→    );\n    57→  }\n    58→\n    59→  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n    60→  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n    61→  let hasApplied = false;\n    62→  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n    63→  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    64→    const app = db\n    65→      .prepare(\n    66→        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    67→      )\n    68→      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    69→    if (app) {\n    70→      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n    71→      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    72→    }\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n    76→  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n    77→  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    78→    pendingApplicants = db\n    79→      .prepare(\n    80→        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n    81→         FROM listing_applications la\n    82→         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n    83→         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n    84→         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n    85→      )\n    86→      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n    87→  }\n    88→\n    89→  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n    90→  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n    91→  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    92→    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    93→    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n    94→  }\n    95→\n    96→  return NextResponse.json({\n    97→    listing: {\n    98→      ...safeListingData,\n    99→      members,\n   100→      memberCount: members.length,\n   101→      isMember,\n   102→      isAuthor,\n   103→      hasApplied,\n   104→      applicationStatus,\n   105→      pendingApplicants,\n   106→      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n   107→      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n   108→      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n   109→    },\n   110→  });\n   111→}\n   112→\n   113→export async function PATCH(\n   114→  req: NextRequest,\n   115→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   116→) {\n   117→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   118→  if (!session) {\n   119→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   120→  }\n   121→\n   122→  const { id } = await params;\n   123→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   124→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   125→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  const listing = db\n   129→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   130→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   131→\n   132→  if (!listing) {\n   133→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   134→  }\n   135→\n   136→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   137→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   138→  }\n   139→\n   140→  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n   141→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   142→    return NextResponse.json(\n   143→      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   144→      { status: 400 }\n   145→    );\n   146→  }\n   147→\n   148→  try {\n   149→    const body = await req.json();\n   150→    const {\n   151→      language,\n   152→      readingPace,\n   153→      startDate,\n   154→      meetingFormat,\n   155→      maxGroupSize,\n   156→      requiresApproval,\n   157→      platformPreference,\n   158→    } = body;\n   159→\n   160→    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n   161→    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n   162→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   163→    }\n   164→\n   165→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   166→      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n   167→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   168→      }\n   169→      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n   170→      if (startDate < today) {\n   171→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n   172→      }\n   173→    }\n   174→\n   175→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n   176→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n   177→    }\n   178→\n   179→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   180→      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n   181→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n   182→      }\n   183→      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   184→      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n   185→        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n   186→      }\n   187→\n   188→      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n   189→      const memberCount = (db\n   190→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   191→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   192→\n   193→      if (size < memberCount) {\n   194→        return NextResponse.json(\n   195→          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n   196→          { status: 400 }\n   197→        );\n   198→      }\n   199→    }\n   200→\n   201→    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n   202→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n   203→    }\n   204→\n   205→    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n   206→      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n   207→    }\n   208→\n   209→    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n   210→    const updates: string[] = [];\n   211→    const values: unknown[] = [];\n   212→\n   213→    if (language !== undefined) {\n   214→      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n   215→      values.push(language);\n   216→    }\n   217→    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n   218→      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n   219→      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n   220→    }\n   221→    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n   222→      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n   223→      values.push(startDate);\n   224→    }\n   225→    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n   226→      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n   227→      values.push(meetingFormat);\n   228→    }\n   229→    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n   230→      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n   231→      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n   232→      values.push(newSize);\n   233→\n   234→      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n   235→      const currentMemberCount = (db\n   236→        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   237→        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n   238→      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n ?`).run(...values);\n   258→\n   259→    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n   260→  } catch (error) {\n   261→    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n   262→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n   263→  }\n   264→}\n   265→\n   266→export async function DELETE(\n   267→  _req: NextRequest,\n   268→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n   269→) {\n   270→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   271→  if (!session) {\n   272→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n   273→  }\n   274→\n   275→  const { id } = await params;\n   276→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n   277→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   278→    return NextResponse.json({ Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n   284→\n   285→  if (!listing) {\n   286→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n   287→  }\n   288→\n   289→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n   290→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n   291→  }\n   292→\n   293→  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n   294→  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n   295→    return NextResponse.json(\n   296→      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n   297→      { status: 400 }\n   298→    );\n   299→  }\n   300→\n   301→  try {\n   302→    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n   303→    const members = db\n   304→      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n   305→      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   306→\n   307→    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n   308→    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n   309→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   310→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   311→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   312→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   313→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   314→      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n   315→    });\n   316→\n   317→    deleteTransaction();\n   318→\n   319→    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n   320→    for (const member of members) {\n   321→      try {\n   322→        createNotification(\n   323→          member.user_id,\n   324→          null,\n   325→          \"listing_deleted\",\n   326→          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n   327→        );\n   328→      } catch {\n   329→        // Notification failure should not block 339→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"9d5d3237-0113-433f-8415-c9636d1a192f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:03:04.507Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","numLines":339,"startLine":1,"totalLines":339}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017B89eprGRMvpxCbH3TFbbc","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n     5→ * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n     6→ */\n     7→export function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n     8→  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n     9→  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n    10→  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    11→    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\n    12→    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    13→    return false;\n    14→  }\n    15→  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n    16→}\n    17→\n    18→/**\n    19→ * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n    20→ */\n    21→export function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n    22→  return text\n    23→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    24→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    25→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    26→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    27→    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n    28→}\n    29→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"d7bdec4a-6e3a-47ef-93e6-35b416f1f7ee","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:03:13.468Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/crypto-utils.ts","content":"import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n\n/**\n * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n */\nexport function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\n    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    return false;\n  }\n  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n}\n\n/**\n * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n */\nexport function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n}\n","numLines":29,"startLine":1,"totalLines":29}}}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":1,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"d 12\"}"}},"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"32b7d4a9-c547-4275-bae5-aa9f8ccea851"}
{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_013sfAw4VrexeR3QNPuxaCFx","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FNppdwT95b7dA2VetxMPXb","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh issue create --title \"Code review round 12: PATCH race condition, internal ID leak\" --label \"bug,P1,approved\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Findings from code review round 12\n\n### 1. PATCH listing — non-transactional `is_full` reopen races with concurrent joins (CRITICAL)\n\n**File:** `app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` lines 235–241\n\nWhen a PATCH increases `max_group_size` to reopen a full listing, the code reads `currentMemberCount` and checks `is_full` outside a transaction. A concurrent join could complete between these reads and the UPDATE, causing `is_full` to be incorrectly cleared — allowing extra members beyond the cap.\n\n**Fix:** Wrap the PATCH update logic (including member count read and `is_full` flip) in a `db.transaction()`.\n\n### 2. `telegram_chat_id` and `discord_channel_id` leaked in listing GET response (IMPORTANT)\n\n**File:** `app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts` lines 90–94\n\nThe `safeListingData` spread includes all columns from `SELECT l.*`, including internal IDs (`telegram_chat_id`, `discord_channel_id`). These should be excluded for non-author users.\n\n**Fix:** Strip internal platform IDs from the response for non-author users.\n\n### 3. `safeCompare` misleading comment about length-timing masking (MINOR)\n\n**File:** `lib/crypto-utils.ts` line 11\n\nThe comment claims length info is masked, but the self-comparison `timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA)` doesn't truly mask it since its duration depends on `bufA.length`. Fix the comment to be accurate.\nEOF\n)\" --project \"Bookmate\"","description":"Create issue for code review round 12"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":556,"cache_read_input_tokens":35835,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":556},"output_tokens":2,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"b1203af0-98ea-4fad-8161-6d9472957586"}

between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CVwmvJDC5EghG7geLyiW4n","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"36611c0c-27b1-4a4b-97b5-4d1103190289","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:03:42.685Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }","newString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Cannot reduce below current member count\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":185,"oldLines":7,"newStart":185,"newLines":7,"lines":["         return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });","       }"," ","-      // Cannot reduce below current member count","+      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)","       const memberCount = (db","         .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","         .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DhyujBUBrMhkPb5thhHHyH","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01H6SqSQTBhGo1iEG7LZbq8h","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","old_string":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);","new_string":"    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":689,"cache_read_input_tokens":37172,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":689},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"ca7a41cb-2fd8-4e83-bdf0-955fcf2a6d26"}

successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"1a0154bd-ca12-4531-a394-d541259205db","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:03:55.146Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);","newString":"    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(newSize);\n\n      // If increasing group size on a full listing, reopen it\n      const currentMemberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n      if (newSize > currentMemberCount && listing.is_full) {\n        updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n        values.push(0);\n      }\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    values.push(listingId);\n    db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":226,"oldLines":19,"newStart":226,"newLines":14,"lines":["       updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");"," (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {","-      const newSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","+      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);","       updates.push(\"max_group_size =
