{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LPktEK8sVabg4GgY6kjA1v","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"785fca9b-931e-4100-8e54-acd1ff6753bf","timestamp":"2026-03-24T09:04:01.803Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/route.ts","oldString":"  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }","newString":"  // Strip sensitive data from the response\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers\n  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;\n  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    // Strip invite links for non-members\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession, requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\nimport { isBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\nimport { isBotConfigured as isDiscordBotConfigured } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE l.id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, lm.joined_at\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN users u ON lm.user_id = u.id\n       WHERE lm.listing_id = ?\n       ORDER BY lm.joined_at ASC`\n    )\n    .all(listingId) as { id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; joined_at: string }[];\n\n  const session = await getSession();\n  const isMember = session.userId\n    ? members.some((m) => m.id === session.userId)\n    : false;\n  const isAuthor = session.userId\n    ? listing.author_id === session.userId\n    : false;\n\n  // PRD: full listings should be invisible to non-participants\n  if (listing.is_full && !isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This listing is no longer available\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Check if the current user has an application (regardless of requires_approval,\n  // since the flag may have been toggled after the application was submitted)\n  let hasApplied = false;\n  let applicationStatus = \"\";\n  if (session.userId && !isMember) {\n    const app = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { status: string } | undefined;\n    if (app) {\n      hasApplied = app.status === \"pending\";\n      applicationStatus = app.status;\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Fetch pending applicants if the viewer is the author\n  let pendingApplicants: { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[] = [];\n  if (isAuthor && listing.requires_approval) {\n    pendingApplicants = db\n      .prepare(\n        `SELECT la.id as application_id, u.id, u.display_name, u.bio, la.applied_at\n         FROM listing_applications la\n         JOIN users u ON la.user_id = u.id\n         WHERE la.listing_id = ? AND la.status = 'pending'\n         ORDER BY la.applied_at ASC`\n      )\n      .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];\n  }\n\n  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs\n  const safeListingData = { ...listing };\n  if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {\n    delete safeListingData.telegram_link;\n    delete safeListingData.discord_link;\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listing: {\n      ...safeListingData,\n      members,\n      memberCount: members.length,\n      isMember,\n      isAuthor,\n      hasApplied,\n      applicationStatus,\n      pendingApplicants,\n      currentUserId: session.userId || null,\n      telegramBotConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n      discordBotConfigured: isDiscordBotConfigured(),\n    },\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can edit this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot edit if a platform link has been shared (group already formed)\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot edit a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const {\n      language,\n      readingPace,\n      startDate,\n      meetingFormat,\n      maxGroupSize,\n      requiresApproval,\n      platformPreference,\n    } = body;\n\n    // Validate fields that are provided — type check before string operations\n    if (readingPace !== undefined && (typeof readingPace !== \"string\" || !readingPace || readingPace.length > 200)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Reading pace is required (max 200 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof startDate !== \"string\" || !/^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDate)) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid start date format (expected YYYY-MM-DD)\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n      if (startDate < today) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Start date cannot be in the past\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined && (typeof meetingFormat !== \"string\" || ![\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat))) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid meeting format\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      if (typeof maxGroupSize !== \"number\" && typeof maxGroupSize !== \"string\") {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid group size type\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n      const size = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      if (isNaN(size) || size < 2 || size > 20) {\n        return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Group size must be between 2 and 20\" }, { status: 400 });\n      }\n\n      // Pre-check member count (authoritative check happens inside transaction below)\n      const memberCount = (db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n      if (size < memberCount) {\n        return NextResponse.json(\n          { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${memberCount})` },\n          { status: 400 }\n        );\n      }\n    }\n\n    if (language !== undefined && (!language || typeof language !== \"string\" || language.length > 100)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Language is required (max 100 characters)\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined && ![\"telegram\", \"discord\"].includes(platformPreference)) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid platform preference\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Build dynamic UPDATE\n    const updates: string[] = [];\n    const values: unknown[] = [];\n\n    if (language !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"language = ?\");\n      values.push(language);\n    }\n    if (readingPace !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"reading_pace = ?\");\n      values.push(readingPace.trim());\n    }\n    if (startDate !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"start_date = ?\");\n      values.push(startDate);\n    }\n    if (meetingFormat !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"meeting_format = ?\");\n      values.push(meetingFormat);\n    }\n    // Track whether maxGroupSize change needs is_full recalculation\n    let needsIsFullRecalc = false;\n    let parsedNewSize = 0;\n    if (maxGroupSize !== undefined) {\n      parsedNewSize = parseInt(String(maxGroupSize), 10);\n      updates.push(\"max_group_size = ?\");\n      values.push(parsedNewSize);\n      needsIsFullRecalc = true;\n    }\n    if (requiresApproval !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"requires_approval = ?\");\n      values.push(requiresApproval ? 1 : 0);\n    }\n    if (platformPreference !== undefined) {\n      updates.push(\"platform_preference = ?\");\n      values.push(platformPreference);\n    }\n\n    if (updates.length === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: \"No fields to update\" }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    // Wrap in transaction to prevent race between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins\n    const updateTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      if (needsIsFullRecalc) {\n        // Re-read member count and is_full inside transaction to prevent stale data\n        const fresh = db.prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n        const currentMemberCount = (db\n          .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n          .get(listingId) as { count: number }).count;\n\n        if (parsedNewSize < currentMemberCount) {\n          return { error: `Cannot reduce group size below current member count (${currentMemberCount})` };\n        }\n\n        if (parsedNewSize > currentMemberCount && fresh?.is_full) {\n          updates.push(\"is_full = ?\");\n          values.push(0);\n        }\n      }\n\n      values.push(listingId);\n      db.prepare(`UPDATE listings SET ${updates.join(\", \")} WHERE id = ?`).run(...values);\n      return null;\n    });\n\n    const txResult = updateTransaction();\n    if (txResult?.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: txResult.error }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Update listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the author can delete this listing\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  // Cannot delete if a platform link has been shared\n  if (listing.telegram_link || listing.discord_link) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Cannot delete a listing after the group chat link has been shared\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  try {\n    // Get members to notify (excluding the author)\n    const members = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id != ?\")\n      .all(listingId, session.userId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n    // Delete in a transaction (notifications sent after, so they aren't wiped)\n    const deleteTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM notifications WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ?\").run(listingId);\n      db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM listings WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    });\n\n    deleteTransaction();\n\n    // Send deletion notifications after transaction (listing_id is NULL since listing is gone)\n    for (const member of members) {\n      try {\n        createNotification(\n          member.user_id,\n          null,\n          \"listing_deleted\",\n          `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" has been cancelled by the organizer.`\n        );\n      } catch {\n        // Notification failure should not block response\n      }\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Delete listing error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":86,"oldLines":9,"newStart":86,"newLines":13,"lines":["       .all(listingId) as { application_id: number; id: number; display_name: string; bio: string; applied_at: string }[];","   }"," ","-  // Strip platform links for non-members to prevent leaking invite URLs","+  // Strip sensitive data from the response","   const safeListingData = { ...listing };","+  // Always strip internal platform IDs — these are internal bot/channel identifiers","+  delete safeListingData.telegram_chat_id;","+  delete safeListingData.discord_channel_id;","   if (!isMember && !isAuthor) {","+    // Strip invite links for non-members","     delete safeListingData.telegram_link;","     delete safeListingData.discord_link;","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

bufA);","originalFile":"import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n\n/**\n * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n */\nexport function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing\n    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    return false;\n  }\n  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n}\n\n/**\n * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n */\nexport function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n  return text\n    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":8,"oldLines":7,"newStart":8,"newLines":9,"lines":["   const bufA = Buffer.from(a);","   const bufB = Buffer.from(b);","   if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {","-    // Still do a comparison to avoid leaking length info via timing","+    // Do a dummy comparison to add some constant work, though this does not","+    // fully mask length differences (bufA self-compare time varies with length).","+    // In practice, the secrets compared here are fixed-length env vars.","     timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);","     return false;","   }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_0176ekuRShUYYjdmYchyyyTA","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_011fNL4EJjvg727f1XydcvbG","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cd /root/Projects/bookmate && git add app/app/api/listings/\\[id\\]/route.ts app/lib/crypto-utils.ts && git commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: PATCH race condition, strip internal platform IDs from API (#98)\n\n1. Wrap PATCH maxGroupSize update in a transaction to prevent race\n   between is_full recalculation and concurrent joins. Re-reads member\n   count and is_full inside the transaction for atomicity.\n\n2. Strip telegram_chat_id and discord_channel_id from the GET listing\n   response — these are internal bot identifiers not meant for clients.\n\n3. Fix misleading comment in safeCompare about length-timing masking.\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"","description":"Commit fixes"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":360,"cache_read_input_tokens":40183,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":360},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"1ae7ab11-8c10-48a9-ad7a-c027a37ef33f"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01VhSnWR3uJBekdn3JCWL5nv","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01D1d5UGojQc5ZhCgacFBchq","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"export GH_TOKEN=$(grep GH_TOKEN /root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/.env | cut -d= -f2) && gh pr create --title \"fix: PATCH race condition, strip internal platform IDs (#98)\" --body \"$(cat <<'EOF'\n## Summary\n- **CRITICAL**: Wrapped PATCH `maxGroupSize` update in a `db.transaction()` to prevent race condition where a concurrent join could cause `is_full` to be incorrectly cleared, allowing members beyond the cap\n- **IMPORTANT**: Strip `telegram_chat_id` and `discord_channel_id` from the GET `/api/listings/[id]` response — internal bot identifiers should not be exposed to clients\n- **MINOR**: Fixed misleading comment in `safeCompare` about length-timing masking\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] All 198 tests pass\n- [x] ESLint clean\n- [x] Build succeeds\n- [ ] Verify PATCH listing with maxGroupSize change works correctly\n- [ ] Verify listing GET response no longer includes internal platform IDs\n\nCloses #98\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)\nEOF\n)\" --project \"Bookmate\"","description":"Create PR"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":281,"cache_read_input_tokens":40891,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":281},"output_tokens":64,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"b87f6e69-2109-4fb5-b9fa-9a3154ee0dd2"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_016EpeECbmapbLQzF4btf2i7","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01V6ighMfbD21YhBt6kkRPpJ","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/.claude-beat/logs/session-2026-03-24-0900.md","content":"# Session Log — 2026-03-24 09:00 UTC\n\n## Summary\nCode review round 12: found and fixed 2 bugs + 1 misleading comment. Created issue #98, implemented fixes in PR #99, CI passed, merged to main, deployed to production.\n\n## Review Findings\n- **Production**: Healthy — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 198 tests pass\n- **CI**: Green on main\n- **Open PRs**: None\n- **Open issues**: #54 (needs-human, PAT expiry), #21 (needs-human, Telegram token)\n- **Emails**: Old notifications only (issue #74 already resolved, NomadLingo unrelated, Google promo)\n- **PRD sync**: All PRD features have corresponding closed issues\n\n## Work Completed\n\n### Issue #98: Code review round 12 (PR #99 — merged + deployed)\n\n3 fixes:\n\n1. **PATCH race condition on `is_full` reopen** (CRITICAL) — When increasing `maxGroupSize` to reopen a full listing, the member count read and `is_full` check happened outside any transaction. A concurrent join could complete between these reads and the UPDATE, incorrectly clearing `is_full` and allowing extra members beyond the cap. Fixed by wrapping the entire PATCH update logic in a `db.transaction()` that re-reads member count and `is_full` inside the transaction.\n\n2. **Internal platform IDs leaked in GET response** (IMPORTANT) — `telegram_chat_id` and `discord_channel_id` were included in the listing GET response for all users. These are internal bot/channel identifiers not meant for client exposure. Fixed by stripping them from the response regardless of auth status.\n\n3. **Misleading `safeCompare` comment** (MINOR) — Comment claimed length-timing was fully masked by self-comparison, which is not accurate. Updated to be truthful about the limitation.\n\nAll 198 tests pass, ESLint clean, build clean, CI green.\n\n## Also Noted (not fixed this round)\n- `notifyGroupFull` reads `platform_preference` outside the join transaction — narrow window for inconsistency if author PATCHes preference simultaneously\n- `BOT_TOKEN` / `CLIENT_ID` captured at module load time — stale after env change without full restart (low risk with PM2 restart model)\n- No `ON DELETE CASCADE` on FK constraints (from round 11 — still open, no user deletion endpoint)\n\n## Issues Monitored\n- **#54 (PAT expiry)**: Critical — needs-human\n- **#21 (Telegram token)**: Still needs-human\n\n## Next Session Priority\n1. Check production health\n2. Monitor PAT expiry (#54) — critical\n3. Consider E2E testing, performance improvements, or new feature proposals\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":581,"cache_read_input_tokens":42573,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":581},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"c5af9c01-55a4-4302-b3ac-73002d7ab6b4"}

Fixed by wrapping the entire PATCH update logic in a `db.transaction()` that re-reads member count and `is_full` inside the transaction.\n\n2. **Internal platform IDs leaked in GET response** (IMPORTANT) — `telegram_chat_id` and `discord_channel_id` were included in the listing GET response for all users. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01Kbq6f7ZKNX3JE9n8RZj6vp","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"## Session Complete — 2026-03-24 09:00 UTC\n\n**What was done:**\n- ✅ Production health check — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 198/198 tests pass\n- ✅ Code review round 12 — found and fixed 2 bugs + 1 misleading comment\n- ✅ **Issue #98** → **PR #99** → merged → deployed to production\n\n**Fixes deployed:**\n1. **CRITICAL**: PATCH listing race condition — `is_full` reopen logic now wrapped in a transaction to prevent concurrent joins from bypassing the group size cap\n2. **IMPORTANT**: Internal platform IDs (`telegram_chat_id`, `discord_channel_id`) stripped from listing GET API response\n3. **MINOR**: Fixed misleading comment in `safeCompare` about length-timing masking\n\n**Monitoring:**\n- Issue #54 (PAT expiry) — critical, needs human action\n- Issue #21 (Telegram bot token) — needs human action"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":288,"cache_read_input_tokens":44068,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":288},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","uuid":"1807149b-b421-4b6a-8569-9abd505b3f77"}

{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"duration_ms":474536,"duration_api_ms":320365,"num_turns":38,"result":"## Session Complete — 2026-03-24 09:00 UTC\n\n**What was done:**\n- ✅ Production health check — HTTP 200, PM2 online, 198/198 tests pass\n- ✅ Code review round 12 — found and fixed 2 bugs + 1 misleading comment\n- ✅ **Issue #98** → **PR #99** → merged → deployed to production\n\n**Fixes deployed:**\n1. **CRITICAL**: PATCH listing race condition — `is_full` reopen logic now wrapped in a transaction to prevent concurrent joins from bypassing the group size cap\n2. **IMPORTANT**: Internal platform IDs (`telegram_chat_id`, `discord_channel_id`) stripped from listing GET API response\n3. **MINOR**: Fixed misleading comment in `safeCompare` about length-timing masking\n\n**Monitoring:**\n- Issue #54 (PAT expiry) — critical, needs human action\n- Issue #21 (Telegram bot token) — needs human action","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"fdc68caf-59cb-4027-98f6-8073dfb4f64d","total_cost_usd":1.4824672999999997,"usage":{"input_tokens":28,"cache_creation_input_tokens":37827,"cache_read_input_tokens":905297,"output_tokens":8438,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":37827,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6":{"inputTokens":28,"outputTokens":8438,"cacheReadInputTokens":905297,"cacheCreationInputTokens":37827,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.9001572500000001,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":64000},"claude-sonnet-4-6":{"inputTokens":17,"outputTokens":5310,"cacheReadInputTokens":641626,"cacheCreationInputTokens":82699,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.58231005,"contextWindow":200000,"maxOutputTokens":32000}},"permission_denials":[],"fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"c17fdb64-97a9-4761-87a5-7a0a36e0e564"}
